---
title: "Interaction among nitrogen addition, litter quality and mesh size modulate litter decomposition in tropical forest"
author: "Yanlin Zhu, Denis Mburu Njoroge, Gbadamassi G.O. Dossa, Juan Zuo, Mareike Roeder, Douglas Schaefer, Yali Song"
date: (Created on 2025 September 23 and last updated on `r format(Sys.time(), "%a %b %d %Y %H:%M:%S")`)
output: 
#rmdformats::material
  html_document:
    fig_caption: yes #Enabling figure caption
    theme: spacelab #readable #sandstone #spacelab #flatly
    highlight: pygments #tango #kate
    toc: TRUE # Enabling table of content (toc) on the left side of output
    toc_depth: 3 # Showing toc up to 3 headings below (i.e.,1, 1.1, 1.1.1)
    number_sections: TRUE # Number sections
    toc_float:
      collapsed: TRUE # Allows the toc to collapse if the reading section is not concerned
      smooth_scroll: TRUE # Allows smoth scrolling of toc
      toc: true
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: sentence
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results="hide")
#Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
```



# Introduction 
Nitrogen (N) deposition continues to impact terrestrial ecosystems and therein ecological functions. But how does N deposition interactively modify the effects of primary drivers of litter decomposition which are climate, litter quality, and soil fauna and microorganisms as well as their interactive effects on mixed litter decomposition remains unknown. We carried out a field decomposition experiment over a year in a tropical forest, SW China, mimicking N deposition by adding adhesive liquid N at three levels (0, 2, 6 g per litterbag) to mixed tree litters (each litterbag containing each two species) varying in quality (high, medium, low). Three mesh size (0.07, 2, 5 mm) were used for the litterbags aiming to control access by different groups of soil fauna to the litter. We also monitored the dynamics of some elements including carbon, nitrogen, calcium, phosphorus, potassium, magnesium, manganese, condensed tannins.  



# Data analysis

The average value of the initial chemical properties of the litter was calculated and one-way analysis of variance was conducted

First, we need to input the file "A2CC.csv" containing the following columns:

1. code is the species code in experiment 2 (A2) with H for High quality and M for Medium quality and L for Low quality high(low) N addition;

2. Totall_quality represents tree quality + N addition quality in this case it is the initial so no nitrogen added;

3. species	represents litter species in the mixture;

4. tree_quality	represents tree quality;

5. Nitrogen_added	represents Nitrogen added which is either 20 g or 5 g but because this file is for initial then nothing was added;

6. Number	represents the repeated measurement of the sample 1 for first measurement and 2 for the second measurement;

7. C_initial	represents initial carbon content;

8. N_initial	represents initial nitrogen content;

9. Ca_initial  	represents initial calcium content;

10. K_initial	represents initial potassium content;

11. Mg_initial	represents initial magnesium content;

12. Mn_initial	represents initial manganese content;

13. P_initial	represents initial phosphorus content;

14. Tannin_initial	represents initial condensed tannins content;

15. C/N	represents initial carbon-nitrogen ratio content;



```{r}
d1<- read.csv("A2CC.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ",", quote = "\"",
              dec = ".", fill = TRUE, comment.char = "",fileEncoding = 'latin1')

summary(d1)
d1$species=as.factor(d1$species)
d1$Totall_quality=as.factor(d1$Totall_quality)
d1$tree_quality=as.factor(d1$tree_quality)
d1$Nitrogen_added=as.factor(d1$Nitrogen_added)
d1$tree_quality=ordered(d1$tree_quality,levels=c("High","Medium","Low"))
#View(d1)
```


## Analysis of variance

```{r}
result <- aov(d1$initial_C ~ d1$tree_quality, data = d1)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)

result <- aov(d1$initial_N ~ d1$tree_quality, data = d1)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)

result <- aov(d1$initial_P ~ d1$tree_quality, data = d1)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)

result <- aov(d1$initial_K ~ d1$tree_quality, data = d1)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)

result <- aov(d1$initial_Ca ~ d1$tree_quality, data = d1)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)


result <- aov(d1$initial_Mg ~ d1$tree_quality, data = d1)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)

result <- aov(d1$initial_Mn ~ d1$tree_quality, data = d1)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)

result <- aov(d1$initial_Tannin ~ d1$tree_quality, data = d1)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)

```

## Table1

We compute the mean and standard error of the initial values of chemical elements.

```{r}
library(dplyr)
d1l<- d1%>% group_by(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added)%>%
  summarise(C=mean(initial_C),seC=sd(initial_C,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()),
            N=mean(initial_N),seN=sd(initial_N,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()),
            Ca=mean(initial_Ca),seCa=sd(initial_Ca,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()),
            K=mean(initial_K),seK=sd(initial_K,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()),
            Mg=mean(initial_Mg),seMg=sd(initial_Mg,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()),
            Mn=mean(initial_Mn),seMn=sd(initial_Mn,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()),
            P=mean(initial_P),seP=sd(initial_P,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()),
            Tannin=mean(initial_Tannin),seTannin=sd(initial_Tannin,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()),
            "C/N"=mean(C/N),"seCN"=sd(C/N,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()),)

#View(d1l)
```

Soil fauna are major drivers of decomposition in terrestrial ecosystems, nitrogen deposition changes the total available soil N, which affects decomposers' growth and activities, and hence litter decomposition and nutrient release. However, how interactions between N addition and soil fauna affect decomposition and nutrient release vary with litter quality remains unknown. Therefore, we used different litterbag mesh size for the decomposition experiment (0.07, 2, 5 mm). 


## First import the experiment data file

We import the file named "A2_February 2026.csv" which contains the mass loss information.
The file A2 represents the main experimental file for this project. Below we describe each column content: 

1. Experiment_type: Experiment2 consisting of a tree mixture (A2) with two N addition levels, 5 g and 20 g per each litterbag; 

2. code: A2FT(H) represents mixture of high quality litter, A2FT(M) mixture of Medium quality litter, A2FT(L) respresents mixture of low quality litter, A2HH represents with mixture of High quality litter+ high N level added (20 g), A2HL represents with mixture of High quality litter + low N level added (5 g), A2MH represents with mixture of Medium quality litter + high N level added (20 g), A2ML represents with mixture of Medium quality litter + low N level added (5 g), A2LH represents with mixture of Low quality litter + high N level added (20 g), A2LL represents with mixture of Low quality litter + low N level added (5 g);

3. tree_quality: tree litter quality ( with H for High quality and M for Medium quality and L for Low quality high(low);

4. species: tree species;

5. quality: tree quality + N addition quality;

6. Nitrogen_added: Nitrogen addition (N 20 for 20 gram of N addition on the litter in each litterbag or N 5 for 5 gram of N addition on the litter in each litterbag);

7. mix_type: mixture type (tree mixture);

8. species_richness: species richness;

9. number: Prior to placement in the sample plots, each treatment consisted of 15 samples (12 for field decomposition across four decomposition periods with three replicates each, and 3 for determining transportation loss);

10. litter_type_quality_tree_1: tree species 1 (mass);

11. litter_type_quality_tree_2: tree species 2 (mass);

12. quality_N: N (mass);

13. mesh_size: litter bag mesh size (To control the entry litter bags of soil fauna of different sizes);

14. total_mass_g: total mass inside the litter bag (litter + N);

15. sample_plot: 12 subplots;

16. plot: 3 plots;

17. harvest: harvest sequence;

18. handling_loss_bags: change of litter mass during transport of litterbags from lab to incubation field (detect the loss on the way);

19. handling_loss: change in litter mass during transportation;

20. initial_mass_g: The initial mass in the litter bag after removing the losses during transportation;

21. Time_at_harvest: harvesting time (number of days);

22. final_mass_g: The mass of litter obtained at different harvest times.


```{r}
A2<- read.csv("A2.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ",", quote = "\"",
              dec = ".", fill = TRUE, comment.char = "",fileEncoding = 'latin1')
A2<-subset(A2, !is.na(final_mass_g))
head(A2)

#Convert to factor before ordering from high to low
str(A2$tree_quality)
A2$tree_quality
levels(A2$tree_quality)
A2$tree_quality <- as.factor(A2$tree_quality)
levels(A2$tree_quality)

A2$tree_quality <- ordered(A2$tree_quality, levels = c("Low","Medium","High" ))
levels(A2$tree_quality)

#Convert to factor before ordering from high N addition to low concentration (0 gram), please note that "zero"
## means no addition for single species
A2$Nitrogen_added <- as.factor(A2$Nitrogen_added)
levels(A2$Nitrogen_added)
#View(A2)
A2$Nitrogen_added <- ordered(A2$Nitrogen_added, levels = c("N_0", "N_2", "N_6"))
levels(A2$Nitrogen_added)

#Convert Time_at_harvest to factor before ordering
A2$Time_at_harvest
levels(A2$Time_at_harvest)
A2$Time_at_harvest<-as.factor(A2$Time_at_harvest)
levels(A2$Time_at_harvest)

A2$Time_at_harvest<-ordered(A2$Time_at_harvest, levels=c("30","60","220","365"))
levels(A2$Time_at_harvest)

str(A2)

#Convert mesh_size to factor
levels(A2$mesh_size)
A2$mesh_size<-as.factor(A2$mesh_size)

# Check our data frame quality
str(A2)

```


## Calculationâloss_rateâ
Prior to any analysis, we need to calculate decomposition rate or mass loss. Here we call it loss_rate. When handling loss is negative, this means there is actual loss during handling from lab to field. Thus the initial mass is the measured mass in lab corrected from the handling loss. 

For two species in mixture there is N addition at different levels, the handling loss consists of both loss of litter after the N was added, we need to be careful of how to compute this. We need some assumption, the handling loss consists of both added N and the litter. Therefore, handling_loss= measured handling_loss*(mass of litter before adding N/total_mass_g after adding N). Only after we measured this, we could then proceed to compute the mixture mass loss. 



## two species

```{r}
dat=A2[A2$species_richness=="2",]
dat$mass=dat$litter_type_quality_tree_1+dat$litter_type_quality_tree_2
dat_1=dat[dat$Nitrogen_added=="N_0",]
dat_11=dat_1[dat_1$handlin_loss<=0,]
dat_11$loss_rate=(dat_11$mass-dat_11$final_mass_g+dat_11$handlin_loss)/(dat_11$mass+dat_11$handlin_loss)
dat_21=dat_1[dat_1$handlin_loss>0,]
dat_21$loss_rate=(dat_21$mass-dat_21$final_mass_g)/(dat_21$mass)
dat_1=rbind(dat_11,dat_21)

dat_2=dat[dat$Nitrogen_added!="N_0",]
#View(dat_2)
dat_2$handlin_loss=dat_2$handlin_loss*(dat_2$mass/dat_2$total_mass_g)
dat_2$loss_rate=(dat_2$mass-dat_2$final_mass_g+dat_2$handlin_loss)/(dat_2$mass+dat_2$handlin_loss)
dat =rbind(dat_1,dat_2)
#View(dat)
dat_c=dat

#Calculate loss rate the litter of different tree quality and  different times
library(dplyr)
dat_ml1<- dat%>% group_by(tree_quality,Time_at_harvest)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(ml= mean(loss_rate),
                   sd= sd(loss_rate),
                   se=sd(loss_rate,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()))
#View(dat_ml1)
```

### Mass loss at 30 days after incubation

```{r, results="hide"}
#draw plot
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
dat$Nitrogen_added <- factor(dat$Nitrogen_added, levels = c("N_0", "N_2", "N_6"),
                             labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))
dat1 <- dat[dat$Time_at_harvest=="30",]
dat_ml1<- dat1%>% group_by(tree_quality,Nitrogen_added, mesh_size)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(ml= mean(loss_rate),
                   sd= sd(loss_rate),
                   se=sd(loss_rate,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()))
dat_ml1$tree_quality<-ordered(dat_ml1$tree_quality, levels=c("High","Medium","Low"))
levels(dat_ml1$tree_quality)


pt1 <-ggplot(dat_ml1,aes(tree_quality,ml,shape=Nitrogen_added,color=mesh_size))+
  geom_rect(data=NULL,aes(xmin=1.5,xmax=2.5,ymin=-Inf,ymax=Inf),
            fill="#E8E8E8", colour = NA, alpha = 0.1)+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(0.9),stat="identity",size=3)+
  geom_errorbar(ymax=dat_ml1$ml+dat_ml1$se,ymin=dat_ml1$ml-dat_ml1$se, width=0.3, position = position_dodge(0.9))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1))+
  scale_colour_manual(values=c("#5867AF","#4C9AC9","#E2745E"))+
  scale_shape_discrete(
    name = "N addition",
    labels = function(x) parse(text = x))+
  labs( colour="mesh_size",title="(a)30days")+
  xlab("Litter quality")+
  ylab("Mass loss proportion")+guides(color=guide_legend(order=2),shape=guide_legend(order=1))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(14)))+
  theme(legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "vertical",
        legend.text = element_text(size=14))+
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=(14)))+
  theme(axis.title = element_text(family = "palatino", size = (14), colour = "black"))+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(family = "palatino", colour = "black", size = (13)))+ 
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank())

pt1

```
### Mass loss at 60 days after incubation

```{r, results="hide"}
dat2 <-dat[dat$Time_at_harvest=="60",]
dat_ml2<- dat2%>% group_by(tree_quality,Nitrogen_added, mesh_size)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(ml= mean(loss_rate),
                   sd= sd(loss_rate),
                   se=sd(loss_rate,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()))
dat_ml2$tree_quality<-ordered(dat_ml2$tree_quality, levels=c("High","Medium","Low"))
levels(dat_ml2$tree_quality)

pt2<-ggplot(dat_ml2,aes(tree_quality,ml,shape=Nitrogen_added,color=mesh_size))+
  geom_rect(data=NULL,aes(xmin=1.5,xmax=2.5,ymin=-Inf,ymax=Inf),
            fill="#E8E8E8", colour = NA, alpha = 0.1)+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(0.9),stat="identity",size=3)+
  geom_errorbar(ymax=dat_ml2$ml+dat_ml2$se,ymin=dat_ml2$ml-dat_ml2$se, width=0.3, position = position_dodge(0.9))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1))+
  scale_colour_manual(values=c("#5867AF","#4C9AC9","#E2745E"))+
  scale_shape_discrete(
    name = "N addition",
    labels = function(x) parse(text = x))+
  labs(colour="mesh_size",title="(b)60days")+ xlab("Litter quality")+
  ylab("Mass loss proportion")+guides(color=guide_legend(order=2),shape=guide_legend(order=1))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(14)))+
  theme(legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "vertical",
        legend.text = element_text(size=14))+
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=(14)))+
  theme(axis.title = element_text(family = "palatino", size = (14), colour = "black"))+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(family = "palatino", colour = "black", size = (13)))+ 
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank())

pt2

```

### Mass loss at 220 days after incubation

```{r, results="hide"}
dat3<-dat[dat$Time_at_harvest=="220",]
dat_ml3<- dat3%>% group_by(tree_quality,Nitrogen_added, mesh_size)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(ml= mean(loss_rate),
                   sd= sd(loss_rate),
                   se=sd(loss_rate,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()))
dat_ml3$tree_quality<-ordered(dat_ml3$tree_quality, levels=c("High","Medium","Low"))
levels(dat_ml3$tree_quality)

pt3<-ggplot(dat_ml3,aes(tree_quality,ml,shape=Nitrogen_added,color=mesh_size))+
  geom_rect(data=NULL,aes(xmin=1.5,xmax=2.5,ymin=-Inf,ymax=Inf),
            fill="#E8E8E8", colour = NA, alpha = 0.1)+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(0.9),stat="identity",size=3)+
  geom_errorbar(ymax=dat_ml3$ml+dat_ml3$se,ymin=dat_ml3$ml-dat_ml3$se, width=0.3, position = position_dodge(0.9))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1))+
  scale_colour_manual(values=c("#5867AF","#4C9AC9","#E2745E"))+ 
  scale_shape_discrete(
    name = "N addition",
    labels = function(x) parse(text = x))+
  labs(colour="mesh_size",title="(c)220days")+ xlab("Litter quality")+
  ylab("Mass loss proportion")+guides(color=guide_legend(order=2),shape=guide_legend(order=1))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(14)))+
  theme(legend.position = "none", 
        legend.direction = "vertical",
        legend.text = element_text(size=14))+
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=(14)))+
  theme(axis.title = element_text(family = "palatino", size = (14), colour = "black"))+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(family = "palatino", colour = "black", size = (13)))+ 
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank())

pt3

```



### Mass loss at 365 days after incubation

```{r, results="hide"}
dat4<-dat[dat$Time_at_harvest=="365",]
dat_ml4<- dat4%>% group_by(tree_quality,Nitrogen_added, mesh_size)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(ml= mean(loss_rate),
                   sd= sd(loss_rate),
                   se=sd(loss_rate,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()))
dat_ml4$tree_quality<-ordered(dat_ml4$tree_quality, levels=c("High","Medium","Low"))
levels(dat_ml4$tree_quality)
pt4 <-ggplot(dat_ml4,aes(tree_quality,ml,shape=Nitrogen_added,color=mesh_size))+
  geom_rect(data=NULL,aes(xmin=1.5,xmax=2.5,ymin=-Inf,ymax=Inf),
            fill="#E8E8E8", colour = NA, alpha = 0.1)+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(0.9),stat="identity",width=0.3,size=3)+
  geom_errorbar(ymax=dat_ml4$ml+dat_ml4$se,ymin=dat_ml4$ml-dat_ml4$se, width=0.3, position = position_dodge(0.9))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1))+
  scale_colour_manual(values=c("#5867AF","#4C9AC9","#E2745E"))+
  scale_shape_discrete(
    name = "N addition",
    labels = function(x) parse(text = x))+
  labs( shape="N addition",colour="mesh_size",title="(d)365days")+ xlab("Litter quality")+
  ylab("Mass loss proportion")+guides(color=guide_legend(order=2),shape=guide_legend(order=1))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(14)))+
  theme(
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    legend.text = element_text(size=14))+
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=(14)))+
  theme(axis.title = element_text(family = "palatino", size = (14), colour = "black"))+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(family = "palatino", colour = "black", size = (13)))+ 
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank())

pt4
```


### Mass loss combination of all four harvests

Mass loss across tree litter qualities in the presence of different decomposer groups across harvest (365 days of field exposure of the litterbags).


```{r}

library(patchwork)

# Put panels together
Graphs_plot <-pt1+pt2+pt3+pt4
Graphs_plot
ggsave(
  filename = paste0("figure S1.png"),
  plot =Graphs_plot,
  width = 13,
  height =9,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)
```

Figure S1


## Decay rates

We have many variables that could potentially interact with time and may cause difficulty to understand the general trend, thus before modeling, we computed the decay rates using "neg.exp" regression within the litter fitter package, doing so could eliminate the many levels for the time variable.

```{r}
library(litterfitter)
dat=dat_c
#View(dat)
dat$Nitrogen_added <- factor(dat$Nitrogen_added, levels = c("N_0", "N_2", "N_6"),
                             labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))
dat$Time_at_harvest=as.numeric(as.character(dat$Time_at_harvest))
dat$loss_rate_adj <- dat$loss_rate
dat <- subset(dat, loss_rate_adj >= 0)
dat$loss_rate_adj[dat$loss_rate_adj == 1] <- 0.999
dat$loss_rate_adj[dat$loss_rate_adj == 0] <- 0.001
dat$mass.remaining=(1-dat$loss_rate_adj)
dat$t=dat$Time_at_harvest/365

dat <- subset(dat, mass.remaining != 0)
#View(dat)

##Separate data presentation :tree_quality="high"ï¼"med"ï¼"low"ï¼Nitrogen_added ="N0g"ï¼"N2g"ï¼"N5g"ï¼mesh_size="5mm"ï¼"2mm"ï¼"0.07mm",plot="plot1","plot2","plot3"

###tree_quality="high"ï¼"med"ï¼"low"ï¼Nitrogen_added ="N0g"
thigh=dat[dat$tree_quality=="High",]
tmed=dat[dat$tree_quality=="Medium",]
tlow=dat[dat$tree_quality=="Low",]
thigh_0=thigh[thigh$Nitrogen_added =="N[0]",]
#View(thigh)

##tree_quality="high",Nitrogen_added ="N0g",mesh_size =="5mm",(plot="plot1","plot2","plot3")
thigh_0_5=thigh_0[thigh_0$mesh_size =="5 mm",]
#View(thigh_0_5)
thigh_0_5_plot1=thigh_0_5[thigh_0_5$plot=="plot1",]
result<- fit_litter(
  thigh_0_5_plot1$t,
  thigh_0_5_plot1$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)

thigh_0_5_plot1$k=result$optimFit$par


thigh_0_5_plot2=thigh_0_5[thigh_0_5$plot=="plot2",]
result <- fit_litter(
  thigh_0_5_plot2$t,
  thigh_0_5_plot2$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
thigh_0_5_plot2$k=result$optimFit$par


thigh_0_5_plot3=thigh_0_5[thigh_0_5$plot=="plot3",]
result <- fit_litter(
  thigh_0_5_plot3$t,
  thigh_0_5_plot3$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
thigh_0_5_plot3$k=result$optimFit$par


##tree_quality="Thigh",Nitrogen_added ="N0g",mesh_size ="2mm",(plot="plot1","plot2","plot3")
thigh_0_2=thigh_0[thigh_0$mesh_size =="2 mm",]
thigh_0_2_plot1=thigh_0_2[thigh_0_2$plot=="plot1",]
result <- fit_litter(
  thigh_0_2_plot1$t,
  thigh_0_2_plot1$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
thigh_0_2_plot1$k=result$optimFit$par


thigh_0_2_plot2=thigh_0_2[thigh_0_2$plot=="plot2",]
result <- fit_litter(
  thigh_0_2_plot2$t,
  thigh_0_2_plot2$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
thigh_0_2_plot2$k=result$optimFit$par


thigh_0_2_plot3=thigh_0_2[thigh_0_2$plot=="plot3",]
result <- fit_litter(
  thigh_0_2_plot3$t,
  thigh_0_2_plot3$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
thigh_0_2_plot3$k=result$optimFit$par

##tree_quality="Thigh",Nitrogen_added ="N0g",mesh_size ="0.07mm",(plot="plot1","plot2","plot3")
thigh_0_0.07=thigh_0[thigh_0$mesh_size =="0.07 mm",]
thigh_0_0.07_plot1=thigh_0_0.07[thigh_0_0.07$plot=="plot1",]
result <- fit_litter(
  thigh_0_0.07_plot1$t,
  thigh_0_0.07_plot1$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp",  
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)

print(result)
thigh_0_0.07_plot1$k=result$optimFit$par


thigh_0_0.07_plot2=thigh_0_0.07[thigh_0_0.07$plot=="plot2",]
result <- fit_litter(
  thigh_0_0.07_plot2$t,
  thigh_0_0.07_plot2$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp",  
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
thigh_0_0.07_plot2$k=result$optimFit$par


thigh_0_0.07_plot3=thigh_0_0.07[thigh_0_0.07$plot=="plot3",]
result <- fit_litter(
  thigh_0_0.07_plot3$t,
  thigh_0_0.07_plot3$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp",  
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
thigh_0_0.07_plot3$k=result$optimFit$par



##tree_quality="Thigh",Nitrogen_added ="N2g",mesh_size ="5mm",(plot="plot1","plot2","plot3")
thigh_2=thigh[thigh$Nitrogen_added =="N[2]",]
#View(thigh)
thigh_2_5=thigh_2[thigh_2$mesh_size =="5 mm",]
thigh_2_5_plot1=thigh_2_5[thigh_2_5$plot=="plot1",]
result <- fit_litter(
  thigh_2_5_plot1$t,
  thigh_2_5_plot1$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)

thigh_2_5_plot1$k=result$optimFit$par

thigh_2_5_plot2=thigh_2_5[thigh_2_5$plot=="plot2",]
result <- fit_litter(
  thigh_2_5_plot2$t,
  thigh_2_5_plot2$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
thigh_2_5_plot2$k=result$optimFit$par


thigh_2_5_plot3=thigh_2_5[thigh_2_5$plot=="plot3",]
result <- fit_litter(
  thigh_2_5_plot3$t,
  thigh_2_5_plot3$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
thigh_2_5_plot3$k=result$optimFit$par

)

  thigh_6_5_plot1$mass.remaining,

  thigh_6_5_plot2$t,
  thigh_6_5_plot2$mass.remaining,

  thigh_6_5_plot3$t,
  thigh_6_5_plot3$mass.remaining,

  thigh_6_2_plot1$t,
  thigh_6_2_plot1$mass.remaining,

  thigh_6_2_plot2$mass.remaining,

##tree_quality="Tmed",Nitrogen_added ="N0g",mesh_size ="5mm",(plot="plot1","plot2","plot3")
tmed_0=tmed[tmed$Nitrogen_added =="N[0]",]
tmed_0_5=tmed_0[tmed_0$mesh_size =="5 mm",]
tmed_0_5_plot1=tmed_0_5[tmed_0_5$plot=="plot1",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tmed_0_5_plot1$t,
  tmed_0_5_plot1$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tmed_0_5_plot1$k=result$optimFit$par

tmed_0_5_plot2=tmed_0_5[tmed_0_5$plot=="plot2",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tmed_0_5_plot2$t,
  tmed_0_5_plot2$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tmed_0_5_plot2$k=result$optimFit$par

tmed_0_5_plot3=tmed_0_5[tmed_0_5$plot=="plot3",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tmed_0_5_plot3$t,
  tmed_0_5_plot3$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tmed_0_5_plot3$k=result$optimFit$par

  tmed_6_0.07_plot1$mass.remaining,

  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000

result <- fit_litter(
  tmed_6_0.07_plot2$t,
  tmed_6_0.07_plot2$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)

tmed_6_0.07_plot2$k=result$optimFit$par


tmed_6_0.07_plot3=tmed_6_0.07[tmed_6_0.07$plot=="plot3",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tmed_6_0.07_plot3$t,
  tmed_6_0.07_plot3$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tmed_6_0.07_plot3$k=result$optimFit$par


##tree_quality="Tlow",Nitrogen_added ="N0g",mesh_size ="5mm",(plot="plot1","plot2","plot3")
tlow_0=tlow[tlow$Nitrogen_added =="N[0]",]
tlow_0_5=tlow_0[tlow_0$mesh_size =="5 mm",]
tlow_0_5_plot1=tlow_0_5[tlow_0_5$plot=="plot1",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_0_5_plot1$t,
  tlow_0_5_plot1$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_0_5_plot1$k=result$optimFit$par


tlow_0_5_plot2=tlow_0_5[tlow_0_5$plot=="plot2",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_0_5_plot2$t,
  tlow_0_5_plot2$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_0_5_plot2$k=result$optimFit$par

tlow_0_5_plot3=tlow_0_5[tlow_0_5$plot=="plot3",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_0_5_plot3$t,
  tlow_0_5_plot3$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_0_5_plot3$k=result$optimFit$par

##tree_quality="Tlow",Nitrogen_added ="N0g",mesh_size ="2mm",(plot="plot1","plot2","plot3")
tlow_0_2=tlow_0[tlow_0$mesh_size =="2 mm",]
tlow_0_2_plot1=tlow_0_2[tlow_0_2$plot=="plot1",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_0_2_plot1$t,
  tlow_0_2_plot1$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_0_2_plot1$k=result$optimFit$par


tlow_0_2_plot2=tlow_0_2[tlow_0_2$plot=="plot2",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_0_2_plot2$t,
  tlow_0_2_plot2$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_0_2_plot2$k=result$optimFit$par


tlow_0_2_plot3=tlow_0_2[tlow_0_2$plot=="plot3",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_0_2_plot3$t,
  tlow_0_2_plot3$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_0_2_plot3$k=result$optimFit$par

##tree_quality="Tlow",Nitrogen_added ="N0g",mesh_size ="0.07mm",(plot="plot1","plot2","plot3")
tlow_0_0.07=tlow_0[tlow_0$mesh_size =="0.07 mm",]
tlow_0_0.07_plot1=tlow_0_0.07[tlow_0_0.07$plot=="plot1",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_0_0.07_plot1$t,
  tlow_0_0.07_plot1$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_0_0.07_plot1$k=result$optimFit$par

tlow_0_0.07_plot2=tlow_0_0.07[tlow_0_0.07$plot=="plot2",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_0_0.07_plot2$t,
  tlow_0_0.07_plot2$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_0_0.07_plot2$k=result$optimFit$par


tlow_0_0.07_plot3=tlow_0_0.07[tlow_0_0.07$plot=="plot3",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_0_0.07_plot3$t,
  tlow_0_0.07_plot3$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_0_0.07_plot3$k=result$optimFit$par

##tree_quality="Tlow",Nitrogen_added ="N2g",mesh_size ="5mm",(plot="plot1","plot2","plot3")
tlow_2=tlow[tlow$Nitrogen_added =="N[2]",]
tlow_2_5=tlow_2[tlow_2$mesh_size =="5 mm",]
tlow_2_5_plot1=tlow_2_5[tlow_2_5$plot=="plot1",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_2_5_plot1$t,
  tlow_2_5_plot1$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_2_5_plot1$k=result$optimFit$par


tlow_2_5_plot2=tlow_2_5[tlow_2_5$plot=="plot2",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_2_5_plot2$t,
  tlow_2_5_plot2$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_2_5_plot2$k=result$optimFit$par


tlow_2_5_plot3=tlow_2_5[tlow_2_5$plot=="plot3",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_2_5_plot3$t,
  tlow_2_5_plot3$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_2_5_plot3$k=result$optimFit$par




##tree_quality="Tlow",Nitrogen_added ="N2g",mesh_size ="2mm",(plot="plot1","plot2","plot3")
tlow_2_2=tlow_2[tlow_2$mesh_size =="2 mm",]
tlow_2_2_plot1=tlow_2_2[tlow_2_2$plot=="plot1",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_2_2_plot1$t,
  tlow_2_2_plot1$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_2_2_plot1$k=result$optimFit$par


tlow_2_2_plot2=tlow_2_2[tlow_2_2$plot=="plot2",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_2_2_plot2$t,
  tlow_2_2_plot2$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_2_2_plot2$k=result$optimFit$par


tlow_2_2_plot3=tlow_2_2[tlow_2_2$plot=="plot3",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_2_2_plot3$t,
  tlow_2_2_plot3$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_2_2_plot3$k=result$optimFit$par



##tree_quality="Tlow",Nitrogen_added ="N2g",mesh_size ="0.07mm",(plot="plot1","plot2","plot3")
tlow_2_0.07=tlow_2[tlow_2$mesh_size =="0.07 mm",]
tlow_2_0.07_plot1=tlow_2_0.07[tlow_2_0.07$plot=="plot1",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_2_0.07_plot1$t,
  tlow_2_0.07_plot1$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_2_0.07_plot1$k=result$optimFit$par


tlow_2_0.07_plot2=tlow_2_0.07[tlow_2_0.07$plot=="plot2",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_2_0.07_plot2$t,
  tlow_2_0.07_plot2$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_2_0.07_plot2$k=result$optimFit$par


tlow_2_0.07_plot3=tlow_2_0.07[tlow_2_0.07$plot=="plot3",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_2_0.07_plot3$t,
  tlow_2_0.07_plot3$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_2_0.07_plot3$k=result$optimFit$par


##tree_quality="Tlow",Nitrogen_added ="N6g",mesh_size ="5mm",(plot="plot1","plot2","plot3")
tlow_6=tlow[tlow$Nitrogen_added =="N[6]",]
tlow_6_5=tlow_6[tlow_6$mesh_size =="5 mm",]
tlow_6_5_plot1=tlow_6_5[tlow_6_5$plot=="plot1",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_6_5_plot1$t,
  tlow_6_5_plot1$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-10,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_6_5_plot1$k=result$optimFit$par


tlow_6_5_plot2=tlow_6_5[tlow_6_5$plot=="plot2",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_6_5_plot2$t,
  tlow_6_5_plot2$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-10,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_6_5_plot2$k=result$optimFit$par

tlow_6_5_plot3=tlow_6_5[tlow_6_5$plot=="plot3",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_6_5_plot3$t,
  tlow_6_5_plot3$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-10,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_6_5_plot3$k=result$optimFit$par

##tree_quality="Tlow",Nitrogen_added ="N6g",mesh_size ="2mm",(plot="plot1","plot2","plot3")
tlow_6_2=tlow_6[tlow_6$mesh_size =="2 mm",]
tlow_6_2_plot1=tlow_6_2[tlow_6_2$plot=="plot1",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_6_2_plot1$t,
  tlow_6_2_plot1$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_6_2_plot1$k=result$optimFit$par

tlow_6_2_plot2=tlow_6_2[tlow_6_2$plot=="plot2",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_6_2_plot2$t,
  tlow_6_2_plot2$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_6_2_plot2$k=result$optimFit$par

tlow_6_2_plot3=tlow_6_2[tlow_6_2$plot=="plot3",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_6_2_plot3$t,
  tlow_6_2_plot3$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_6_2_plot3$k=result$optimFit$par


##tree_quality="Tlow",Nitrogen_added ="N6g",mesh_size ="0.07mm",(plot="plot1","plot2","plot3")
tlow_6_0.07=tlow_6[tlow_6$mesh_size =="0.07 mm",]
tlow_6_0.07_plot1=tlow_6_0.07[tlow_6_0.07$plot=="plot1",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_6_0.07_plot1$t,
  tlow_6_0.07_plot1$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_6_0.07_plot1$k=result$optimFit$par

tlow_6_0.07_plot2=tlow_6_0.07[tlow_6_0.07$plot=="plot2",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_6_0.07_plot2$t,
  tlow_6_0.07_plot2$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_6_0.07_plot2$k=result$optimFit$par

tlow_6_0.07_plot3=tlow_6_0.07[tlow_6_0.07$plot=="plot3",]
result <- fit_litter(
  tlow_6_0.07_plot3$t,
  tlow_6_0.07_plot3$mass.remaining,
  model = "neg.exp", 
  lower = 1e-6,
  iters = 1000
)
print(result)
tlow_6_0.07_plot3$k=result$optimFit$par


##Combined result
dat1=rbind(thigh_0_5_plot1,thigh_0_5_plot2,thigh_0_5_plot3,thigh_0_2_plot1,thigh_0_2_plot2,thigh_0_2_plot3,
           thigh_0_0.07_plot1,thigh_0_0.07_plot2,thigh_0_0.07_plot3,thigh_2_5_plot1,thigh_2_5_plot2,thigh_2_5_plot3,
           thigh_2_2_plot1,thigh_2_2_plot2,thigh_2_2_plot3,thigh_2_0.07_plot1,thigh_2_0.07_plot2,thigh_2_0.07_plot3,
           thigh_6_5_plot1,thigh_6_5_plot2,thigh_6_5_plot3,thigh_6_2_plot1,thigh_6_2_plot2,thigh_6_2_plot3,
           thigh_6_0.07_plot1,thigh_6_0.07_plot2,thigh_6_0.07_plot3)

dat2=rbind(tmed_0_5_plot1,tmed_0_5_plot2,tmed_0_5_plot3,tmed_0_2_plot1,tmed_0_2_plot2,tmed_0_2_plot3,
           tmed_0_0.07_plot1,tmed_0_0.07_plot2,tmed_0_0.07_plot3,tmed_2_5_plot1,tmed_2_5_plot2,tmed_2_5_plot3,
           tmed_2_2_plot1,tmed_2_2_plot2,tmed_2_2_plot3,tmed_2_0.07_plot1,tmed_2_0.07_plot2,tmed_2_0.07_plot3,
           tmed_6_5_plot1,tmed_6_5_plot2,tmed_6_5_plot3,tmed_6_2_plot1,tmed_6_2_plot2,tmed_6_2_plot3,
           tmed_6_0.07_plot1,tmed_6_0.07_plot2,tmed_6_0.07_plot3)

dat3=rbind(tlow_0_5_plot1,tlow_0_5_plot2,tlow_0_5_plot3,tlow_0_2_plot1,tlow_0_2_plot2,tlow_0_2_plot3,
           tlow_0_0.07_plot1,tlow_0_0.07_plot2,tlow_0_0.07_plot3,tlow_2_5_plot1,tlow_2_5_plot2,tlow_2_5_plot3,
           tlow_2_2_plot1,tlow_2_2_plot2,tlow_2_2_plot3,tlow_2_0.07_plot1,tlow_2_0.07_plot2,tlow_2_0.07_plot3,
           tlow_6_5_plot1,tlow_6_5_plot2,tlow_6_5_plot3,tlow_6_2_plot1,tlow_6_2_plot2,tlow_6_2_plot3,
           tlow_6_0.07_plot1,tlow_6_0.07_plot2,tlow_6_0.07_plot3)

dat=rbind(dat1,dat2,dat3)
#View(dat)

```

### Draw plot figure 1

Next we need to draw the Figure 1 of the manuscript.


```{r}
dat_m<- dat%>% group_by(tree_quality,Nitrogen_added, mesh_size,plot,species)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(K= mean(k))
#View(dat_m)
nrow(dat_m)

#draw plot
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
dat_ml1<- dat_m%>% group_by(tree_quality,Nitrogen_added, mesh_size)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(ml= mean(K),
                   sd= sd(K),
                   se=sd(K,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()))
dat_ml1$tree_quality<-ordered(dat_ml1$tree_quality, levels=c("High","Medium","Low"))
levels(dat_ml1$tree_quality)
#View(dat_ml1)

pt0 <-ggplot(dat_ml1,aes(tree_quality,ml,shape=Nitrogen_added,color=mesh_size))+
  geom_rect(data=NULL,aes(xmin=1.5,xmax=2.5,ymin=-Inf,ymax=Inf),
            fill="#E8E8E8", colour = NA, alpha = 0.1)+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(0.9),stat="identity",size=1.3)+
  geom_errorbar(ymax=dat_ml1$ml+dat_ml1$se,ymin=dat_ml1$ml-dat_ml1$se, width=0.3, position = position_dodge(0.9))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,5.5))+
  scale_colour_manual(values=c("#5867AF","#4C9AC9","#E2745E"))+
  scale_shape_discrete(
    name = "N addition",
    labels = function(x) parse(text = x))+
  labs( colour="Mesh size")+
  xlab("Litter quality")+
  ylab(expression(paste( "Decomposition constant k " ( yrs^ -1 ))))+guides(color=guide_legend(order=2),shape=guide_legend(order=1))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(11)))+
  theme(
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    legend.text = element_text(size=11))+
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=(11)))+
  theme(axis.title = element_text(family = "palatino", size = (11), colour = "black"))+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(family = "palatino", colour = "black", size = (11)))+ 
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank())

pt0


ggsave(
  filename = paste0("Figure 1.png"),
  plot =pt0,
  width = 6,
  height =4,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

```

Figure 1



## Establish the lmm model
We need to establish the linear mixed effect model (Table X).

```{r}
## Inverse normal transformationï¼Inverse Normal Transformationï¼
hist(dat_m$K)
dat_m$transrate <- log(dat_m$K)
hist(dat_m$transrate)

##Run package
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(pbkrtest)
##Build full model Consider interaction
mod4=lmer(data=dat_m, transrate~Nitrogen_added*tree_quality*mesh_size+plot+(1|species))
summary(mod4)
anova(mod4)

mod3=lm(data=dat_m, transrate~Nitrogen_added*tree_quality*mesh_size+plot)
summary(mod3)
anova(mod4,mod3)

###ä¼¼ç¶æ¯æ£éªæ¨¡å
#model_no_3way <- update(mod4, . ~ . - tree_quality:mesh_size:Nitrogen_added)

#anova(model_no_3way)
#anova(mod4,model_no_3way)

###r2æ£éª
library(MuMIn)
r2 <- r.squaredGLMM(mod4)
r2
##Diagnostic model
plot(mod4)
qqnorm(resid(mod4), main = "Q-Qå¾ï¼æ®å·®ï¼")
```


This shows no difference between 0.07 mm and 2 mm mesh sizes litterbag decay rates, while 5 mm differs from 0.07 mm and 5 mm differs from 2 mm. 
```{r}
##one-way analysis of variance'mesh_size'
result <- aov(dat_m$transrate ~ dat_m$mesh_size, data = dat_m)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)

```




## Nutrient release (K, Ca, Mg, Mn, C, N, P, condensed tannins) from litter

A2c.csv is the file that contains the chemical element nutrient dynamics. It consists of the following columns:


1. Experiment_type	Experiment2;

2. code	A2FT(H) represents mixture of high quality litter, A2FT(M) mixture of Medium quality litter, A2FT(L) respresents mixture of low quality litter, A2HH represents with mixture of High quality litter+ high N level added (20 g), A2HL represents with mixture of High quality litter + low N level added (5 g), A2MH represents with mixture of Medium quality litter + high N level added (20 g), A2ML represents with mixture of Medium quality litter + low N level added (5 g), A2LH represents with mixture of Low quality litter + high N level added (20 g), A2LL represents with mixture of Low quality litter + low N level added (5 g);
	
3. tree_quality	tree quality;

4. species	tree species;

5. quality	tree quality + N addition quality;

6. Nitrogen_added	Nitrogen addition (N 20/N 5);

7. mix_type	mixture type (tree mixture);

8. species_richness	species richness; 

9. number	Repeated measurement of the sample;

10. mesh_size	litter bag mesh size(To control the entry litter bags of soil fauna of different sizes);

11. Time_at_harvest	harvesting time; 

12. final_mass_g	The mass of litter obtained at different harvest times; 

13. k	Decomposition rate constant k;

14. C_initial	represents initial carbon content; 

15. N_initial	represents initial nitrogen content;

16. Ca_initial represents initial calcium content;

17. K_initial	represents initial potassium content; 

18. Mg_initial	represents initial magnesium content; 

19. Mn_initial	represents initial manganese content; 

20. P_initial	represents initial phosphorus content;

21. Tannin_initial	represents initial condensed tannin content; 

22. C/N	represents initial carbon-nitrogen ratio content;

23. C	The carbon content at different decomposition times;

24. N	The nitrogen content at different decomposition times;

25. Ca	The calcium content at different decomposition times; 

26. K	The potassium content at different decomposition times;

27. Mg	The magnesium content at different decomposition times; 

28. Mn	The manganese content at different decomposition times; 

29. P	The phosphorus content at different decomposition times; 

30. Tannin	The condensed tannins content at different decomposition times;


```{r}
#setwd("C:/Users/86183/Desktop/A2shuju")
d1ll<- read.csv("A2c.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ",", quote = "\"",
                dec = ".", fill = TRUE, comment.char = "",fileEncoding = 'latin1')
summary(d1ll)

d1ll$C=as.numeric(d1ll$C)
d1ll$N=as.numeric(d1ll$N)
d1ll$P=as.numeric(d1ll$P)
d1ll$K=as.numeric(d1ll$K)
d1ll$Ca=as.numeric(d1ll$Ca)
d1ll$Mg=as.numeric(d1ll$Mg)
d1ll$Mn=as.numeric(d1ll$Mn)
d1ll$Tannin=as.numeric(d1ll$Tannin)

str(d1ll)

d1ll$initial_mass=d1ll$in_mass
d1ll$final_mass=d1ll$final_mass_g


#Calculate the nutrient release rate
d1ll$loss_K=((d1ll$K_initial*d1ll$initial_mass-d1ll$K*d1ll$final_mass)/(d1ll$K_initial*d1ll$initial_mass))*100
d1ll$loss_Ca=((d1ll$Ca_initial*d1ll$initial_mass-d1ll$Ca*d1ll$final_mass)/(d1ll$Ca_initial*d1ll$initial_mass))*100
d1ll$loss_Mg=((d1ll$Mg_initial*d1ll$initial_mass-d1ll$Mg*d1ll$final_mass)/(d1ll$Mg_initial*d1ll$initial_mass))*100
d1ll$loss_C=((d1ll$C_initial*d1ll$initial_mass-d1ll$C*d1ll$final_mass)/(d1ll$C_initial*d1ll$initial_mass))*100
d1ll$loss_N=((d1ll$N_initial*d1ll$initial_mass-d1ll$N*d1ll$final_mass)/(d1ll$N_initial*d1ll$initial_mass))*100
d1ll$loss_P=((d1ll$P_initial*d1ll$initial_mass-d1ll$P*d1ll$final_mass)/(d1ll$P_initial*d1ll$initial_mass))*100
d1ll$loss_Mn=((d1ll$Mn_initial*d1ll$initial_mass-d1ll$Mn*d1ll$final_mass)/(d1ll$Mn_initial*d1ll$initial_mass))*100
d1ll$loss_Tannin=((d1ll$Tannin_initial*d1ll$initial_mass-d1ll$Tannin*d1ll$final_mass)/(d1ll$Tannin_initial*d1ll$initial_mass))*100

#View(d1ll)


d1ll$Time_at_harvest=as.character(d1ll$Time_at_harvest)
d1ll$Time_at_harvest=as.numeric(d1ll$Time_at_harvest)
d1ll$mesh_size <- ordered(d1ll$mesh_size, levels = c("5 mm", "2 mm", "0.07 mm"))

#
d1ll_big=d1ll[d1ll$mesh_size=="5 mm",]
d1ll_med=d1ll[d1ll$mesh_size=="2 mm",]
d1ll_fine=d1ll[d1ll$mesh_size=="0.07 mm",]

#View(d1ll_big)
```


### Carbon dynamics 

```{r, results='hold'}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
#View(d1ll_big)
Carb_5_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_big,  
                         aes(y =loss_C, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added),
                         alpha = 0.4, 
                         size = 3,
                         width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                         height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_big,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_C ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,100))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour ="N addition ", title = " 5 mm", 
       x= " Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( " Carbon release rate (%)" )))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=8,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"),
                     labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))
#Carb_5_mm
```



```{r}

result <- aov(d1ll_fine$loss_C ~ d1ll_fine$Nitrogen_added, data = d1ll_fine)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(d1ll_med$loss_C ~ d1ll_med$Nitrogen_added, data = d1ll_med)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(d1ll_big$loss_C ~ d1ll_big$Nitrogen_added, data = d1ll_big)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
```


```{r}

Carb_2_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_med,  
                         aes(y =loss_C, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                         alpha = 0.4, 
                         size = 3,
                         width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                         height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_med,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_C ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,100))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour ="N addition", title = " 2 mm", 
       x= "  Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( " Carbon release rate (%)" )))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Carb_2_mm
```


```{r}
Carb_0.07_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_fine,  
                         aes(y =loss_C, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                         alpha = 0.4, 
                         size = 3,
                         width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                         height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_fine,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_C ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,100))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour =" N addition", title = "0.07 mm", 
       x= " Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( "Carbon release rate (%)" )))+
  theme(legend.position = c(0.28,0.80))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"),
                     labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))
#Carb_0.07_mm


Carb=Carb_0.07_mm+Carb_2_mm+Carb_5_mm



#ggsave(filename="Figure S2carbon.png", plot=Carb, device="tiff",
#       height=3, width=9, units="in", dpi=600)

```


### Nitrogen dynamics

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

Nitr_5_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_big,  
                         aes(y =loss_N, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                         alpha = 0.4, 
                         size = 3,
                         width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                         height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_big,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_N ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,120))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour =" N addition ", title = " 5 mm", 
       x= " Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( "Nitrogen release rate (%)" )))+
  #theme(legend.position = c(0.2,0.85))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Nitr_5_mm
```


```{r}

Nitr_2_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_med,  
                         aes(y =loss_N, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                         alpha = 0.4, 
                         size = 3,
                         width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                         height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_med,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_N ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,120))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour =" N addition", title = "2 mm", 
       x= " Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( " Nitrogen release rate (%)" )))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Nitr_2_mm

```

```{r}
Nitr_0.07_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_fine,  
                         aes(y =loss_N, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                         alpha = 0.4, 
                         size = 3,
                         width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                         height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_fine,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_N ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,120))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour =" N addition", title = "0.07 mm", 
       x= "Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( " Nitrogen release rate (%)" )))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"),
                     labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))
#Nitr_0.07_mm

Nitr=Nitr_0.07_mm+Nitr_2_mm+Nitr_5_mm
#Nitr

ggsave(filename="Figure S2Nitrogen.png", plot=Nitr, device="tiff",
       height=3, width=9, units="in", dpi=600)

```


```{r}
result <- aov(d1ll_fine$loss_N ~ d1ll_fine$Nitrogen_added, data = d1ll_fine)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(d1ll_med$loss_N ~ d1ll_med$Nitrogen_added, data = d1ll_med)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(d1ll_big$loss_N ~ d1ll_big$Nitrogen_added, data = d1ll_big)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
```





### Phosphorus dynamics

```{r}
Phos_5_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_big,  
                         aes(y =loss_P, x = Time_at_harvest, color = Nitrogen_added ),
                         alpha = 0.4, 
                         size = 3,
                         width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                         height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_big,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_P ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,100))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour ="N addition", title = "5 mm", 
       x= "Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( " Phosphorus release rate (%)" )))+
  #theme(legend.position = c(0.2,0.85))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Phos_5_mm
```

```{r}
Phos_2_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_med,  
                         aes(y =loss_P, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                         alpha = 0.4, 
                         size = 3,
                         width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                         height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_med,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_P ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,100))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour ="Litter type", title = "2 mm", 
       x= "Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( " Phosphorus release rate (%)" )))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Phos_2_mm
```

```{r}
Phos_0.07_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_fine,  
                         aes(y =loss_P, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                         alpha = 0.4, 
                         size = 3,
                         width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                         height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_fine,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_P ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,100))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour =" Litter type", title = "0.07 mm", 
       x= " Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( " Phosphorus release rate (%)" )))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Phos_0.07_mm


Phos=Phos_0.07_mm+Phos_2_mm+Phos_5_mm
Phos
#ggsave(filename="Figure S2Phosphorus.png", plot=Phos, device="tiff",
#       height=3, width=9, units="in", dpi=600)
```

```{r}
result <- aov(d1ll_fine$loss_P~ d1ll_fine$Nitrogen_added, data = d1ll_fine)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(d1ll_med$loss_P ~ d1ll_med$Nitrogen_added, data = d1ll_med)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(d1ll_big$loss_P ~ d1ll_big$Nitrogen_added, data = d1ll_big)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)

```



### Potassium dynamics

```{r}
Pota_5_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_big,  
                          aes(y =loss_K, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                          alpha = 0.4, 
                          size = 3,
                          width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                          height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_big,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_K ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,100))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour =" Litter type", title = "5 mm", 
       x= "Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( " Potassium release rate (%)" )))+
  #theme(legend.position = c(0.2,0.85))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Pota_5_mm
```



```{r}
Pota_2_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_med,  
                          aes(y =loss_K, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                          alpha = 0.4, 
                          size = 3,
                          width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                          height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_med,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_K ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,100))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour =" Litter type", title = " 2 mm", 
       x= "Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( " Potassium release rate (%)" )))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Pota_2_mm
```


```{r}

Pota_0.07_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_fine,  
                          aes(y =loss_K, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                          alpha = 0.4, 
                          size = 3,
                          width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                          height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_fine,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_K ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,100))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour =" Litter type", title = "0.07 mm", 
       x= " Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( "Potassium release rate (%)" )))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  #theme(legend.position = c(0.28,0.80))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Pota_0.07_mm


Pota=Pota_0.07_mm+Pota_2_mm+Pota_5_mm
#Pota
#ggsave(filename="Figure S2Potassium.png", plot=Pota, device="tiff",
#       height=3, width=9, units="in", dpi=600)
```



### Calcium dynamics

```{r}
Calc_5_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_big,  
                          aes(y =loss_Ca, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                          alpha = 0.4, 
                          size = 3,
                          width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                          height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_big,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_Ca ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-50,100))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour =" Litter type", title = "5 mm", 
       x= "Decomposition time ")+  ylab( expression(paste( "Calcium release rate (%)" )))+
  #theme(legend.position = c(0.2,0.85))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Calc_5_mm
```


```{r}
Calc_2_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_med,  
                          aes(y =loss_Ca, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                          alpha = 0.4, 
                          size = 3,
                          width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                          height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_med,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_Ca ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-50,100))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour =" Litter type", title = "2 mm", 
       x= "Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( "Calcium release rate (%)" )))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Calc_2_mm

#View(d1ll_fine)
```

```{r}
Calc_0.07_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_fine,  
                          aes(y =loss_Ca, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                          alpha = 0.4, 
                          size = 3,
                          width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                          height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_fine,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_Ca ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-50,100))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour ="N addition", title = "0.07 mm", 
       x= " Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( "Calcium release rate (%)" )))+
  #theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(legend.position = c(0.2,0.8))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"),
                     labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))
#Calc_0.07_mm

Calc=Calc_0.07_mm+Calc_2_mm+Calc_5_mm
Calc

#ggsave(filename="Figure S3Calcium.png", plot=Calc, device="tiff",
#       height=3, width=9, units="in", dpi=600)
```



### Magnesium dynamics

```{r}
Magn_5_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_big,  
                          aes(y =loss_Mg, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                          alpha = 0.4, 
                          size = 3,
                          width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                          height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_big,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_Mg ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-50,100))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour =" Litter type", title = "5 mm", 
       x= " Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( " Magnesium release rate (%)" )))+
  #theme(legend.position = c(0.2,0.85))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Magn_5_mm
```


```{r}
Magn_2_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_med,  
                          aes(y =loss_Mg, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                          alpha = 0.4, 
                          size = 3,
                          width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                          height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_med,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_Mg ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-50,100))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour =" Litter type", title = " 2 mm", 
       x= " Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( " Magnesium release rate (%)" )))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Magn_2_mm
```


```{r}

Magn_0.07_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_fine,  
                          aes(y =loss_Mg, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                          alpha = 0.4, 
                          size = 3,
                          width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                          height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_fine,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_Mg ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-50,100))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour =" Litter type", title = "0.07 mm", 
       x= " Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( " Magnesium release rate (%)" )))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Magn_0.07_mm

Magn=Magn_0.07_mm+Magn_2_mm+Magn_5_mm
#Magn

#ggsave(filename="Figure S3Magnesium.png", plot=pK, device="tiff",
#       height=3, width=9, units="in", dpi=600)
```


### Manganese dynamics

```{r}
Mang_5_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_big,  
                          aes(y =loss_Mn, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                          alpha = 0.4, 
                          size = 3,
                          width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                          height = 5) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_big,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_Mn ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-100,100))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour =" Litter type", title = "5 mm", 
       x= "Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( " Manganese release rate (%)" )))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  #theme(legend.position = c(0.2,0.85))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Mang_5_mm
```

```{r}
Mang_2_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_med,  
                          aes(y =loss_Mn, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                          alpha = 0.4, 
                          size = 3,
                          width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                          height = 5) +
```
