```{r}
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_med,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_Mn ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-100,100))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour =" Litter type", title = "2 mm", 
       x= " Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( " Manganese release rate (%)" )))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Mang_2_mm
```

```{r}

Mang_0.07_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_fine,  
                          aes(y =loss_Mn, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                          alpha = 0.4, 
                          size = 3,
                          width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                          height = 5) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_fine,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_Mn,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-100,100))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour ="Litter type", title = "0.07 mm", 
       x= " Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( " Manganese release rate (%)" )))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  #theme(legend.position = c(0.28,0.80))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Mang_0.07_mm


Mang=Mang_0.07_mm+Mang_2_mm+Mang_5_mm
#Mang

#ggsave(filename="Figure S3Manganese.png", plot=Mang, device="tiff",
#       height=3, width=9, units="in", dpi=600)
```


### Condensed tannins dynamics


```{r}
Cond_5_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_big,  
                          aes(y =loss_Tannin, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                          alpha = 0.4, 
                          size = 3,
                          width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                          height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_big,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_Tannin ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,120))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour =" Litter type", title = "5 mm", 
       x= " Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( "Tannins release rate(%)" )))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  #theme(legend.position = c(0.2,0.85))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Cond_5_mm
```


```{r}
Cond_2_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_med,  
                          aes(y =loss_Tannin, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                          alpha = 0.4, 
                          size = 3,
                          width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                          height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_med,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_Tannin ,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,120))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour =" Litter type", title = "2 mm", 
       x= " Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( "Tannins release rate(%)" )))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Cond_2_mm
```


```{r}
Cond_0.07_mm=ggplot()+geom_jitter(data =d1ll_fine,  
                          aes(y =loss_Tannin, x = Time_at_harvest, color =Nitrogen_added ),
                          alpha = 0.4, 
                          size = 3,
                          width = 15,   # æ°´å¹³æå¨å¹åº¦
                          height = 0) +  
  geom_smooth(data=d1ll_fine,method = "lm",formula = y ~ poly(x, 2),se=FALSE,n=200, aes(x=Time_at_harvest , y=loss_Tannin,color=Nitrogen_added),size=1.0,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,120))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,400))+
  labs(colour =" Litter type", title = "0.07 mm", 
       x= " Decomposition time (days)")+  ylab( expression(paste( "Tannins release rate(%)" )))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.8, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Cond_0.07_mm


Cond=Cond_0.07_mm+Cond_2_mm+Cond_5_mm
#Cond
#ggsave(filename="Figure S3Condensed tannins.png", plot=Cond, device="tiff",
#       height=3, width=9, units="in", dpi=600)




#View(d1ll)
```


For the supplementary figures S2 and S3, we need to create the patchwork.



```{r}
FigS2<-Carb/Nitr/Phos/Pota
ggsave(filename="Figure S2.png", plot=FigS2, device="tiff",
       height=3, width=9, units="in", dpi=600)
FigS2
```

Figure S2



```{r}
FigS3<-Calc/Magn/Mang/Cond
ggsave(filename="Figure S3.png", plot=FigS3, device="tiff",
       height=3, width=9, units="in", dpi=600)
FigS3

```

Figure S3




#calculation of k value of 
```{r}
A1b<- d1ll %>% dplyr::select(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size,number, Time_at_harvest,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
                             K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial,loss_C)
A1b$loss_C<- as.numeric(A1b$loss_C)
library(tidyr)
dt<-A1b %>% drop_na()
#View(dt)
str(dt)
dt$mass_remaining<- (100- dt$loss_C)/100
data_aggregated <- dt %>%
  group_by(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size, number,Time_at_harvest,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
           K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial) %>% # Group by the identifier and time columns
  dplyr::summarize(value = mean(mass_remaining, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% # Aggregate (take the mean)
  ungroup()
any(is.na(data_aggregated $value))

# Reshape the data for litterfitter
lit <-data_aggregated 

lit$mass_remaining=lit$value
lit$Time_at_harvest<- as.character(as.character(lit$Time_at_harvest))  
lit$Time_at_harvest<- as.numeric(as.character(lit$Time_at_harvest))
lit$time_yrs<- lit$Time_at_harvest/365

#View(lit)
library("dplyr")

x2 <- lit[which(lit$mass_remaining < 1),]
#View(x2)

library(litterfitter)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(litterfitter)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)


options(na.action = "na.omit")

# turn a list of dataframes into a long dataframe
list_to_df <- function(mylist){
  
  # make a vector of row ids that correspond to the list names
  rowid.indx <- lapply(mylist, function(x) dim(x)[1])
  sourceVec.list <- list()
  for(i in 1:length(rowid.indx)){
    sourceName <- names(rowid.indx)[i]
    numRows <- rowid.indx[[i]]
    sourceVec.list[[i]] <- rep(sourceName, numRows)
  }
  rowVec <- unlist(sourceVec.list)
  
  # combine into df
  df <- data.frame(do.call(rbind, mylist))
  df$source <- rowVec
  
  return(df)
}


# calculate decay trajectory fits for each species per treatment 
Calc_R2<-function(w.fits){
  
  pred<-w.fits[['predicted']]
  mass<-w.fits[['mass']]
  
  sstot<-sum((mass - mean(mass))^2)
  ssres<-sum((pred - mass)^2)
  r2<-1-(ssres/sstot)
  
  return(r2)
}



# decay fits
fit_all_curves<-function(df_in, lit){
  
  #df_in <- pmr  #testing stuff
  
  #negative expon fit
  ne_fits <- lapply(split(df_in, factor(df_in$species)),function(x){
    fit_litter(time = x$time_yrs, 
               mass.remaining = x$mass_remaining, model = c("neg.exp"), iters = 1000)
  })
  #create bootstrap distrib and get the 95% CI
  boot.ne<-lapply(ne_fits, function(x){
    bootmat<-bootstrap_parameters(x, nboot=10) 
    #plot(bootmat)
    mean.loss_C<-mean(bootmat[,1])
    ci.loss_C<-quantile(bootmat[,1], c(.05, .95))
    result<-data.frame(mean.loss_C, lower.loss_C = ci.loss_C[[1]], upper.loss_C= ci.loss_C[[2]])
    return(result)
  })
  boot.ne.df <- list_to_df(boot.ne)
  # from ne model
  loss_C<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$oPpimFit$par))
  t50<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) time_to_prop_mass_remaining(x,threshold.mass=0.5)))
  neg.exp.aic<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$fitAICc))
  ne.r2<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) Calc_R2(x)))
  
  loss_C<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$optimFit$par))
  # put everything in a dataframe
  spdf<-data.frame(loss_C=loss_C)
  spdf$species<-rownames(spdf)
  
  return(spdf)
}  
neg.exp<-litterfitter:::neg.exp


decayfits1<-x2 %>%
  group_by(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size,number,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
           K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial) %>%
  do(data.frame(fit_all_curves(.)))
#View(decayfits1)
dat_ll1=decayfits1

dat_ll1$Nitrogen_added <- factor(dat_ll1$Nitrogen_added,levels = c("N_0", "N_2", "N_6"), 
                             labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))

dat_ll1$mesh_size <- factor(dat_ll1$mesh_size,levels = c("0.07 mm", "2 mm", "5 mm"))
```


### Carbon

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
dat_ml1<-dat_ll1 %>% group_by(Nitrogen_added, mesh_size)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(ml= mean(loss_C),
                   sd= sd(loss_C),
                   se=sd(loss_C,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()))

Carb_decay=ggplot(dat_ml1,aes(mesh_size,ml,color=Nitrogen_added))+
  geom_rect(data=NULL,aes(xmin=1.5,xmax=2.5,ymin=-Inf,ymax=Inf),
            fill="#E8E8E8", colour = NA, alpha = 0.1)+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(0.9),stat="identity",size=3)+
  geom_errorbar(ymax=dat_ml1$ml+dat_ml1$se,ymin=dat_ml1$ml-dat_ml1$se, width=0.3, position = position_dodge(0.9))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,3))+
  annotate("text", x = 1, y = 0, label = "ns")+
  annotate("text", x = 2, y = 0, label = "ns")+
  annotate("text", x = 2.75, y = 0, label = "b")+
  annotate("text", x = 3, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 3.25, y =0, label = "ab")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F"),
                     labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))+
  theme(legend.position = c(0.24,0.80))+
  labs( colour="N addition")+
  xlab("Mesh size")+
  ylab(expression(paste( "Decomposition constant carbon" ~~( yrs^ -1 ))))+guides(color=guide_legend(order=2),shape=guide_legend(order=1))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(11)))+
  theme(
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    legend.text = element_text(size=11))+
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=(11)))+
  theme(axis.title = element_text(family = "palatino", size = (11), colour = "black"))+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(family = "palatino", colour = "black", size = (12)))+ 
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank())


#Carb_decay


ggsave(filename="Figure 2 carbon decay constant.png", plot=Carb_decay, device="tiff",
       height=3.5, width=4, units="in", dpi=600)
```




##one-way analysis of variance'mesh_size'

```{r}
dat_ll1$transrate=log(dat_ll1$loss_C )
dat_ll1_fine=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="0.07 mm",]
dat_ll1_med=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="2 mm",]
dat_ll1_big=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="5 mm",]
result <- aov(dat_ll1_fine$transrate ~ dat_ll1_fine$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_fine)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(dat_ll1_med$transrate ~ dat_ll1_med$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_med)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(dat_ll1_big$transrate ~ dat_ll1_big$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_big)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
```

#### Establish the lmm model

```{r}
##Inverse normal transformationï¼Inverse Normal Transformationï¼
hist(dat_ll1$loss_C)
hist(dat_ll1$transrate)

##Run package
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(pbkrtest)
##Build full model Consider interaction
mod4=lmer(data=dat_ll1, transrate~Nitrogen_added*mesh_size+(1|species))
summary(mod4)
anova(mod4)

###ä¼¼ç¶æ¯æ£éªæ¨¡å
model_no_3way <- update(mod4, . ~ . - mesh_size:Nitrogen_added)
anova(model_no_3way)
anova(mod4,model_no_3way)

###r2æ£éª
library(MuMIn)
r2 <- r.squaredGLMM(mod4)
r2
##Diagnostic model
plot(mod4)
qqnorm(resid(mod4), main = "Q-Qå¾ï¼æ®å·®ï¼")
```


```{r}

cor_test <- cor.test(dat_ll1$k, dat_ll1$loss_C)
cor_value <- round(cor_test$estimate, 3)
cor_value
p_value <- round(cor_test$p.value, 4)
cor_test$p.value
```

```{r}
Mass_decay_vs_Carb_decay=ggplot()+ geom_point(data = dat_ll1, 
                        aes(y = loss_C , x =k),
                        alpha = 0.5, 
                        size = 3) + 
  geom_smooth(data=dat_ll1,method = "lm",colour= "black" ,se=TRUE, aes(x=k , y= loss_C),size=1,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,5))+
  labs(colour ="Mesh size")+ 
       xlab( expression(paste("Decomposition constant k "~ ( yrs^ -1 ))))+ylab( expression(paste("Decomposition constant carbon "~( yrs^ -1 ) )))+
  annotate("text", x = 3, y = 4.5, size=4,label = "italic(R^2)==0.777~~~italic(p)<0.001", parse=TRUE, colour= "black" ) +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.2,0.85))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.15, "cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Mass_decay_vs_Carb_decay

ggsave(filename="Figure 4 Mass decay constant and Carbon decay constant.png", plot=Mass_decay_vs_Carb_decay, device="tiff",height=3.5, width=4, units="in", dpi=600)


```


### Nitrogen

```{r}
A1b<- d1ll %>% dplyr::select(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size,number, Time_at_harvest,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
                             K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial,loss_N)
A1b$loss_N<- as.numeric(A1b$loss_N)
library(tidyr)
dt<-A1b %>% drop_na()
#View(dt)
str(dt)
dt$mass_remaining<- (100- dt$loss_N)/100
data_aggregated <- dt %>%
  group_by(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size, number,Time_at_harvest,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
           K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial) %>% # Group by the identifier and time columns
  dplyr::summarize(value = mean(mass_remaining, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% # Aggregate (take the mean)
  ungroup()
any(is.na(data_aggregated $value))

# Reshape the data for litterfitter
lit <-data_aggregated 

lit$mass_remaining=lit$value
lit$Time_at_harvest<- as.character(as.character(lit$Time_at_harvest))  
lit$Time_at_harvest<- as.numeric(as.character(lit$Time_at_harvest))
lit$time_yrs<- lit$Time_at_harvest/365

#View(lit)
library("dplyr")

x2 <- lit[which(lit$mass_remaining < 1),]
#View(x2)

library(litterfitter)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(litterfitter)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)


options(na.action = "na.omit")

# turn a list of dataframes into a long dataframe
list_to_df <- function(mylist){
  
  # make a vector of row ids that correspond to the list names
  rowid.indx <- lapply(mylist, function(x) dim(x)[1])
  sourceVec.list <- list()
  for(i in 1:length(rowid.indx)){
    sourceName <- names(rowid.indx)[i]
    numRows <- rowid.indx[[i]]
    sourceVec.list[[i]] <- rep(sourceName, numRows)
  }
  rowVec <- unlist(sourceVec.list)
  
  # combine into df
  df <- data.frame(do.call(rbind, mylist))
  df$source <- rowVec
  
  return(df)
}


# calculate decay trajectory fits for each species per treatment 
Calc_R2<-function(w.fits){
  
  pred<-w.fits[['predicted']]
  mass<-w.fits[['mass']]
  
  sstot<-sum((mass - mean(mass))^2)
  ssres<-sum((pred - mass)^2)
  r2<-1-(ssres/sstot)
  
  return(r2)
}



# decay fits
fit_all_curves<-function(df_in, lit){
  
  #df_in <- pmr  #testing stuff
  
  #negative expon fit
  ne_fits <- lapply(split(df_in, factor(df_in$species)),function(x){
    fit_litter(time = x$time_yrs, 
               mass.remaining = x$mass_remaining, model = c("neg.exp"), iters = 1000)
  })
  #create bootstrap distrib and get the 95% CI
  boot.ne<-lapply(ne_fits, function(x){
    bootmat<-bootstrap_parameters(x, nboot=10) 
    #plot(bootmat)
    mean.loss_N<-mean(bootmat[,1])
    ci.loss_N<-quantile(bootmat[,1], c(.05, .95))
    result<-data.frame(mean.loss_N, lower.loss_N = ci.loss_N[[1]], upper.loss_N= ci.loss_N[[2]])
    return(result)
  })
  boot.ne.df <- list_to_df(boot.ne)
  # from ne model
  loss_N<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$oPpimFit$par))
  t50<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) time_to_prop_mass_remaining(x,threshold.mass=0.5)))
  neg.exp.aic<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$fitAICc))
  ne.r2<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) Calc_R2(x)))
  
  loss_N<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$optimFit$par))
  # put everything in a dataframe
  spdf<-data.frame(loss_N=loss_N)
  spdf$species<-rownames(spdf)
  
  return(spdf)
}  
neg.exp<-litterfitter:::neg.exp


decayfits2<-x2 %>%
  group_by(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size,number,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
           K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial) %>%
  do(data.frame(fit_all_curves(.)))
#View(decayfits2)
dat_ll1=decayfits2

dat_ll1$Nitrogen_added <- factor(dat_ll1$Nitrogen_added,levels = c("N_0", "N_2", "N_6"), 
                                 labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))

dat_ll1$mesh_size <- factor(dat_ll1$mesh_size,levels = c("0.07 mm", "2 mm", "5 mm"))


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
dat_ml1<-dat_ll1 %>% group_by(Nitrogen_added, mesh_size)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(ml= mean(loss_N),
                   sd= sd(loss_N),
                   se=sd(loss_N,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()))

Nitr_decay=ggplot(dat_ml1,aes(mesh_size,ml,color=Nitrogen_added))+
  geom_rect(data=NULL,aes(xmin=1.5,xmax=2.5,ymin=-Inf,ymax=Inf),
            fill="#E8E8E8", colour = NA, alpha = 0.1)+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(0.9),stat="identity",size=3)+
  geom_errorbar(ymax=dat_ml1$ml+dat_ml1$se,ymin=dat_ml1$ml-dat_ml1$se, width=0.3, position = position_dodge(0.9))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,5))+
  annotate("text", x = 0.75, y = 0, label = "c")+
  annotate("text", x = 1, y = 0, label = "b")+
  annotate("text", x = 1.25, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 1.75, y = 0, label = "c")+
  annotate("text", x = 2, y = 0, label = "b")+
  annotate("text", x = 2.25, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 2.75, y = 0, label = "b")+
  annotate("text", x = 3, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 3.25, y =0, label = "a")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F"),
                     labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  labs( colour="N addition")+
  xlab("Mesh size")+
  ylab(expression(paste( "Decomposition constant nitrogen"~~( yrs^ -1 ))))+guides(color=guide_legend(order=2),shape=guide_legend(order=1))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(11)))+
  theme(
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    legend.text = element_text(size=11))+
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=(11)))+
  theme(axis.title = element_text(family = "palatino", size = (11), colour = "black"))+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(family = "palatino", colour = "black", size = (12)))+ 
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank())

Nitr_decay


ggsave(filename="Figure 2 Nitrogen decay constant.png", plot=Nitr_decay, device="tiff",
       height=3.5, width=4, units="in", dpi=600)
```



#### one-way analysis of variance'mesh_size'

```{r}
dat_ll1$transrate=log(dat_ll1$loss_N )
dat_ll1_fine=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="0.07 mm",]
dat_ll1_med=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="2 mm",]
dat_ll1_big=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="5 mm",]
result <- aov(dat_ll1_fine$transrate ~ dat_ll1_fine$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_fine)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(dat_ll1_med$transrate ~ dat_ll1_med$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_med)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(dat_ll1_big$transrate ~ dat_ll1_big$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_big)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)

```



#### Establish the lmm model

Mass_decay_vs_Nitr_decay

```{r}
##Inverse normal transformationï¼Inverse Normal Transformationï¼
hist(dat_ll1$loss_N)


##Run package
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(pbkrtest)
##Build full model Consider interaction
mod4=lmer(data=dat_ll1, transrate~Nitrogen_added*mesh_size+(1|species))
summary(mod4)
anova(mod4)

###ä¼¼ç¶æ¯æ£éªæ¨¡å
model_no_3way <- update(mod4, . ~ . - mesh_size:Nitrogen_added)
anova(model_no_3way)
anova(mod4,model_no_3way)

###r2æ£éª
library(MuMIn)
r2 <- r.squaredGLMM(mod4)
r2
##Diagnostic model
plot(mod4)
qqnorm(resid(mod4), main = "Q-Qå¾ï¼æ®å·®ï¼")


```


```{r}
cor_test <- cor.test(dat_ll1$k, dat_ll1$loss_N)
cor_value <- round(cor_test$estimate, 3)
cor_value
p_value <- round(cor_test$p.value, 4)
cor_test$p.value
```


```{r}
Mass_decay_vs_Nitr_decay=ggplot()+ geom_point(data = dat_ll1, 
                        aes(y = loss_N , x =k),
                        alpha = 0.5, 
                        size = 3) + 
  geom_smooth(data=dat_ll1,method = "lm",colour= "black" ,se=TRUE, aes(x=k , y= loss_N),size=1,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,8))+
  labs(colour ="Mesh size")+ 
  xlab( expression(paste("Decomposition constant k " ~( yrs^ -1 ))))+ylab( expression(paste("Nitrogen decomposition constant "~( yrs^ -1 ) )))+
  annotate("text", x = 3, y = 7, size=4,label = "italic(R^2)==0.532~~~italic(p)<0.001", parse=TRUE, colour= "black" ) +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.2,0.85))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.15, "cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Mass_decay_vs_Nitr_decay

ggsave(filename="Figure 4 Mass decay constant and Nitrogen decay constant.png", plot=Mass_decay_vs_Nitr_decay, device="tiff",
       height=3.5, width=4, units="in", dpi=600)

```


### Phosphorus

```{r}

A1b<- d1ll %>% dplyr::select(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size,number, Time_at_harvest,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
                             K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial,loss_P)
A1b$loss_P<- as.numeric(A1b$loss_P)
library(tidyr)
dt<-A1b %>% drop_na()
#View(dt)
str(dt)
dt$mass_remaining<- (100- dt$loss_P)/100
data_aggregated <- dt %>%
  group_by(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size, number,Time_at_harvest,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
           K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial) %>% # Group by the identifier and time columns
  dplyr::summarize(value = mean(mass_remaining, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% # Aggregate (take the mean)
  ungroup()
any(is.na(data_aggregated $value))

# Reshape the data for litterfitter
lit <-data_aggregated 

lit$mass_remaining=lit$value
lit$Time_at_harvest<- as.character(as.character(lit$Time_at_harvest))  
lit$Time_at_harvest<- as.numeric(as.character(lit$Time_at_harvest))
lit$time_yrs<- lit$Time_at_harvest/365

#View(lit)
library("dplyr")

x2 <- lit[which(lit$mass_remaining < 1),]
#View(x2)

library(litterfitter)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(litterfitter)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)


options(na.action = "na.omit")

# turn a list of dataframes into a long dataframe
list_to_df <- function(mylist){
  
  # make a vector of row ids that correspond to the list names
  rowid.indx <- lapply(mylist, function(x) dim(x)[1])
  sourceVec.list <- list()
  for(i in 1:length(rowid.indx)){
    sourceName <- names(rowid.indx)[i]
    numRows <- rowid.indx[[i]]
    sourceVec.list[[i]] <- rep(sourceName, numRows)
  }
  rowVec <- unlist(sourceVec.list)
  
  # combine into df
  df <- data.frame(do.call(rbind, mylist))
  df$source <- rowVec
  
  return(df)
}


# calculate decay trajectory fits for each species per treatment 
Calc_R2<-function(w.fits){
  
  pred<-w.fits[['predicted']]
  mass<-w.fits[['mass']]
  
  sstot<-sum((mass - mean(mass))^2)
  ssres<-sum((pred - mass)^2)
  r2<-1-(ssres/sstot)
  
  return(r2)
}



# decay fits
fit_all_curves<-function(df_in, lit){
  
  #df_in <- pmr  #testing stuff
  
  #negative expon fit
  ne_fits <- lapply(split(df_in, factor(df_in$species)),function(x){
    fit_litter(time = x$time_yrs, 
               mass.remaining = x$mass_remaining, model = c("neg.exp"), iters = 1000)
  })
  #create bootstrap distrib and get the 95% CI
  boot.ne<-lapply(ne_fits, function(x){
    bootmat<-bootstrap_parameters(x, nboot=10) 
    #plot(bootmat)
    mean.loss_P<-mean(bootmat[,1])
    ci.loss_P<-quantile(bootmat[,1], c(.05, .95))
    result<-data.frame(mean.loss_P, lower.loss_P = ci.loss_P[[1]], upper.loss_P= ci.loss_P[[2]])
    return(result)
  })
  boot.ne.df <- list_to_df(boot.ne)
  # from ne model
  loss_P<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$oPpimFit$par))
  t50<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) time_to_prop_mass_remaining(x,threshold.mass=0.5)))
  neg.exp.aic<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$fitAICc))
  ne.r2<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) Calc_R2(x)))
  loss_P<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$optimFit$par))
  # put everything in a dataframe
  spdf<-data.frame(loss_P=loss_P)
  spdf$species<-rownames(spdf)
  
  return(spdf)
}  
neg.exp<-litterfitter:::neg.exp


decayfits3<-x2 %>%
  group_by(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size,number,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
           K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial) %>%
  do(data.frame(fit_all_curves(.)))
#View(decayfits3)
dat_ll1=decayfits3

dat_ll1$Nitrogen_added <- factor(dat_ll1$Nitrogen_added,levels = c("N_0", "N_2", "N_6"), 
                                 labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))

dat_ll1$mesh_size <- factor(dat_ll1$mesh_size,levels = c("0.07 mm", "2 mm", "5 mm"))


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
dat_ml1<-dat_ll1 %>% group_by(Nitrogen_added, mesh_size)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(ml= mean(loss_P),
                   sd= sd(loss_P),
                   se=sd(loss_P,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()))

Phos_decay=ggplot(dat_ml1,aes(mesh_size,ml,color=Nitrogen_added))+
  geom_rect(data=NULL,aes(xmin=1.5,xmax=2.5,ymin=-Inf,ymax=Inf),
            fill="#E8E8E8", colour = NA, alpha = 0.1)+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(0.9),stat="identity",size=3)+
  geom_errorbar(ymax=dat_ml1$ml+dat_ml1$se,ymin=dat_ml1$ml-dat_ml1$se, width=0.3, position = position_dodge(0.9))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,3))+
  #annotate("text", x = 0.75, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 1, y = 0, label = "ns")+
  #annotate("text", x = 1.25, y = 0, label = "c")+
  annotate("text", x = 1.75, y = 0, label = "ab")+
  annotate("text", x = 2, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 2.25, y = 0, label = "b")+
  annotate("text", x = 2.75, y = 0, label = "ab")+
  annotate("text", x = 3, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 3.25, y =0, label = "b")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F"),
                     labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  labs( colour="N addition")+
  xlab("Mesh size")+
  ylab(expression(paste( "Phosphorus decomposition constant "~~ ( yrs^ -1 ))))+guides(color=guide_legend(order=2),shape=guide_legend(order=1))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(11)))+
  theme(
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    legend.text = element_text(size=11))+
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=(11)))+
  theme(axis.title = element_text(family = "palatino", size = (11), colour = "black"))+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(family = "palatino", colour = "black", size = (12)))+ 
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank())

#Phos_decay


ggsave(filename="Figure 2 Phosphorus decay constant.png", plot=Phos_decay, device="tiff",
       height=3.5, width=4, units="in", dpi=600)
```



#### one-way analysis of variance'mesh_size'


```{r}
dat_ll1$transrate=log(dat_ll1$loss_P )
dat_ll1_fine=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="0.07 mm",]
dat_ll1_med=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="2 mm",]
dat_ll1_big=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="5 mm",]
result <- aov(dat_ll1_fine$transrate ~ dat_ll1_fine$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_fine)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(dat_ll1_med$transrate ~ dat_ll1_med$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_med)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(dat_ll1_big$transrate ~ dat_ll1_big$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_big)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)

```



#### Establish the lmm model

Mass_decay_vs_Phos_decay

```{r}
##Inverse normal transformationï¼Inverse Normal Transformationï¼
hist(dat_ll1$loss_P)
hist(dat_ll1$transrate)

##Run package
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(pbkrtest)
##Build full model Consider interaction
mod4=lmer(data=dat_ll1, transrate~Nitrogen_added*mesh_size+(1|species))
summary(mod4)
anova(mod4)

###ä¼¼ç¶æ¯æ£éªæ¨¡å
model_no_3way <- update(mod4, . ~ . - mesh_size:Nitrogen_added)
anova(model_no_3way)
anova(mod4,model_no_3way)

###r2æ£éª
library(MuMIn)
r2 <- r.squaredGLMM(mod4)
r2
##Diagnostic model
plot(mod4)
qqnorm(resid(mod4), main = "Q-Qå¾ï¼æ®å·®ï¼")


```

```{r}
cor_test <- cor.test(dat_ll1$k, dat_ll1$loss_P)
cor_value <- round(cor_test$estimate, 3)
cor_value
p_value <- round(cor_test$p.value, 4)
cor_test$p.value
```

```{r}
Mass_decay_vs_Phos_decay=ggplot()+ geom_point(data = dat_ll1, 
                        aes(y = loss_P , x =k),
                        alpha = 0.5, 
                        size = 3) + 
  geom_smooth(data=dat_ll1,method = "lm",colour= "black" ,se=TRUE, aes(x=k , y= loss_P),size=1,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,4))+
  labs(colour ="Mesh size")+ 
  xlab( expression(paste("Decomposition constant k " ~( yrs^ -1 ))))+ylab( expression(paste("Phosphorus decomposition constant "~( yrs^ -1 ) )))+
  annotate("text", x = 3, y = 3.5, size=4,label = "italic(R^2)==0.577~~~italic(p)<0.001", parse=TRUE, colour= "black" ) +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.2,0.85))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.15, "cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Mass_decay_vs_Phos_decay


ggsave(filename="Figure 4 mass decay constant and Phosphorus decay constant.png", plot=Mass_decay_vs_Phos_decay, device="tiff",
       height=4, width=4, units="in", dpi=600)
```



### Potassium K

```{r}
A1b<- d1ll %>% dplyr::select(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size,number, Time_at_harvest,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
                             K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial,loss_K)
A1b$loss_K<- as.numeric(A1b$loss_K)
library(tidyr)
dt<-A1b %>% drop_na()
#View(dt)
str(dt)
dt$mass_remaining<- (100- dt$loss_K)/100
data_aggregated <- dt %>%
  group_by(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size, number,Time_at_harvest,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
           K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial) %>% # Group by the identifier and time columns
  dplyr::summarize(value = mean(mass_remaining, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% # Aggregate (take the mean)
  ungroup()
any(is.na(data_aggregated $value))

# Reshape the data for litterfitter
lit <-data_aggregated 

lit$mass_remaining=lit$value
lit$Time_at_harvest<- as.character(as.character(lit$Time_at_harvest))  
lit$Time_at_harvest<- as.numeric(as.character(lit$Time_at_harvest))
lit$time_yrs<- lit$Time_at_harvest/365

#View(lit)
library("dplyr")

x2 <- lit[which(lit$mass_remaining < 1),]
#View(x2)

library(litterfitter)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(litterfitter)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)


options(na.action = "na.omit")

# turn a list of dataframes into a long dataframe
list_to_df <- function(mylist){
  
  # make a vector of row ids that correspond to the list names
  rowid.indx <- lapply(mylist, function(x) dim(x)[1])
  sourceVec.list <- list()
  for(i in 1:length(rowid.indx)){
    sourceName <- names(rowid.indx)[i]
    numRows <- rowid.indx[[i]]
    sourceVec.list[[i]] <- rep(sourceName, numRows)
  }
  rowVec <- unlist(sourceVec.list)
  
  # combine into df
  df <- data.frame(do.call(rbind, mylist))
  df$source <- rowVec
  
  return(df)
}


# calculate decay trajectory fits for each species per treatment 
Calc_R2<-function(w.fits){
  
  pred<-w.fits[['predicted']]
  mass<-w.fits[['mass']]
  
  sstot<-sum((mass - mean(mass))^2)
  ssres<-sum((pred - mass)^2)
  r2<-1-(ssres/sstot)
  
  return(r2)
}



# decay fits
fit_all_curves<-function(df_in, lit){
  
  #df_in <- pmr  #testing stuff
  
  #negative expon fit
  ne_fits <- lapply(split(df_in, factor(df_in$species)),function(x){
    fit_litter(time = x$time_yrs, 
               mass.remaining = x$mass_remaining, model = c("neg.exp"), iters = 1000)
  })
  #create bootstrap distrib and get the 95% CI
  boot.ne<-lapply(ne_fits, function(x){
    bootmat<-bootstrap_parameters(x, nboot=10) 
    #plot(bootmat)
    mean.loss_K<-mean(bootmat[,1])
    ci.loss_K<-quantile(bootmat[,1], c(.05, .95))
    result<-data.frame(mean.loss_K, lower.loss_K = ci.loss_K[[1]], upper.loss_K= ci.loss_K[[2]])
    return(result)
  })
  boot.ne.df <- list_to_df(boot.ne)
  # from ne model
  loss_K<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$oPpimFit$par))
  t50<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) time_to_prop_mass_remaining(x,threshold.mass=0.5)))
  neg.exp.aic<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$fitAICc))
  ne.r2<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) Calc_R2(x)))
  loss_K<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$optimFit$par))
  # put everything in a dataframe
  spdf<-data.frame(loss_K=loss_K)
  spdf$species<-rownames(spdf)
  
  return(spdf)
}  
neg.exp<-litterfitter:::neg.exp


decayfits4<-x2 %>%
  group_by(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size,number,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
           K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial) %>%
  do(data.frame(fit_all_curves(.)))
#View(decayfits4)
dat_ll1=decayfits4

dat_ll1$Nitrogen_added <- factor(dat_ll1$Nitrogen_added,levels = c("N_0", "N_2", "N_6"), 
                                 labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))

dat_ll1$mesh_size <- factor(dat_ll1$mesh_size,levels = c("0.07 mm", "2 mm", "5 mm"))


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
dat_ml1<-dat_ll1 %>% group_by(Nitrogen_added, mesh_size)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(ml= mean(loss_K),
                   sd= sd(loss_K),
                   se=sd(loss_K,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()))

Pota_decay=ggplot(dat_ml1,aes(mesh_size,ml,color=Nitrogen_added))+
  geom_rect(data=NULL,aes(xmin=1.5,xmax=2.5,ymin=-Inf,ymax=Inf),
            fill="#E8E8E8", colour = NA, alpha = 0.1)+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(0.9),stat="identity",size=3)+
  geom_errorbar(ymax=dat_ml1$ml+dat_ml1$se,ymin=dat_ml1$ml-dat_ml1$se, width=0.3, position = position_dodge(0.9))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,3))+
  #annotate("text", x = 0.75, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 1, y = 0, label = "ns")+
  #annotate("text", x = 1.25, y = 0, label = "c")+
  annotate("text", x = 1.75, y = 0, label = "ab")+
  annotate("text", x = 2, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 2.25, y = 0, label = "b")+
  annotate("text", x = 2.75, y = 0, label = "ab")+
  annotate("text", x = 3, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 3.25, y =0, label = "b")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F"),
                     labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  labs( colour="N addition")+
  xlab("Mesh size")+
  ylab(expression(paste( "Potassium decomposition constant"~~ ( yrs^ -1 ))))+guides(color=guide_legend(order=2),shape=guide_legend(order=1))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(11)))+
  theme(
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    legend.text = element_text(size=11))+
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=(11)))+
  theme(axis.title = element_text(family = "palatino", size = (11), colour = "black"))+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(family = "palatino", colour = "black", size = (12)))+ 
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank())

#Pota_decay


ggsave(filename="Figure 2 Potassium decay constant.png", plot=Pota_decay, device="tiff",
       height=3.5, width=4, units="in", dpi=600)
```



#### one-way analysis of variance'mesh_size'

```{r}
dat_ll1$transrate=log(dat_ll1$loss_K )
dat_ll1_fine=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="0.07 mm",]
dat_ll1_med=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="2 mm",]
dat_ll1_big=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="5 mm",]
result <- aov(dat_ll1_fine$transrate ~ dat_ll1_fine$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_fine)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(dat_ll1_med$transrate ~ dat_ll1_med$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_med)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(dat_ll1_big$transrate ~ dat_ll1_big$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_big)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
```


#### Establish the lmm model

```{r}
##Inverse normal transformationï¼Inverse Normal Transformationï¼
hist(dat_ll1$loss_K)
hist(dat_ll1$transrate)

##Run package
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(pbkrtest)
##Build full model Consider interaction
mod4=lmer(data=dat_ll1, transrate~Nitrogen_added*mesh_size+(1|species))
summary(mod4)
anova(mod4)

###ä¼¼ç¶æ¯æ£éªæ¨¡å
model_no_3way <- update(mod4, . ~ . - mesh_size:Nitrogen_added)
anova(model_no_3way)
anova(mod4,model_no_3way)

###r2æ£éª
library(MuMIn)
r2 <- r.squaredGLMM(mod4)
r2
##Diagnostic model
plot(mod4)
qqnorm(resid(mod4), main = "Q-Qå¾ï¼æ®å·®ï¼")


```

```{r}
cor_test <- cor.test(dat_ll1$k, dat_ll1$loss_K)
cor_value <- round(cor_test$estimate, 3)
cor_value
p_value <- round(cor_test$p.value, 4)
cor_test$p.value
```

```{r}
Mass_decay_vs_Pota_decay=ggplot()+ geom_point(data = dat_ll1, 
                        aes(y = loss_K , x =k),
                        alpha = 0.5, 
                        size = 3) + 
  geom_smooth(data=dat_ll1,method = "lm",colour= "black" ,se=TRUE, aes(x=k , y= loss_K),size=1,linetype=1)+
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,4))+
  #scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,4))+
  labs(colour ="Mesh size")+ 
  xlab( expression(paste("Decomposition constant k " ~( yrs^ -1 ))))+ylab( expression(paste("Potassium decomposition constant "~( yrs^ -1 ) )))+
  annotate("text", x = 2, y = 3.5, size=4,label = "italic(R^2)==0.476~~~italic(p)<0.001", parse=TRUE, colour= "black" ) +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.2,0.85))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.15, "cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
Mass_decay_vs_Pota_decay

ggsave(filename="Figure 4 Mass decay constant and Potassium decay constant.png", plot=Mass_decay_vs_Pota_decay, device="tiff",
       height=4, width=4, units="in", dpi=600)

```



### Calcium

```{r}
A1b<- d1ll %>% dplyr::select(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size,number, Time_at_harvest,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
                             K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial,loss_Ca)
A1b$loss_Ca<- as.numeric(A1b$loss_Ca)
library(tidyr)
dt<-A1b %>% drop_na()
#View(dt)
str(dt)
dt$mass_remaining<- (100- dt$loss_Ca)/100
data_aggregated <- dt %>%
  group_by(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size, number,Time_at_harvest,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
           K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial) %>% # Group by the identifier and time columns
  dplyr::summarize(value = mean(mass_remaining, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% # Aggregate (take the mean)
  ungroup()
any(is.na(data_aggregated $value))

# Reshape the data for litterfitter
lit <-data_aggregated 

lit$mass_remaining=lit$value
lit$Time_at_harvest<- as.character(as.character(lit$Time_at_harvest))  
lit$Time_at_harvest<- as.numeric(as.character(lit$Time_at_harvest))
lit$time_yrs<- lit$Time_at_harvest/365

#View(lit)
library("dplyr")

x2 <- lit[which(lit$mass_remaining < 1),]
#View(x2)

library(litterfitter)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(litterfitter)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)


options(na.action = "na.omit")

# turn a list of dataframes into a long dataframe
list_to_df <- function(mylist){
  
  # make a vector of row ids that correspond to the list names
  rowid.indx <- lapply(mylist, function(x) dim(x)[1])
  sourceVec.list <- list()
  for(i in 1:length(rowid.indx)){
    sourceName <- names(rowid.indx)[i]
    numRows <- rowid.indx[[i]]
    sourceVec.list[[i]] <- rep(sourceName, numRows)
  }
  rowVec <- unlist(sourceVec.list)
  
  # combine into df
  df <- data.frame(do.call(rbind, mylist))
  df$source <- rowVec
  
  return(df)
}


# calculate decay trajectory fits for each species per treatment 
Calc_R2<-function(w.fits){
  
  pred<-w.fits[['predicted']]
  mass<-w.fits[['mass']]
  
  sstot<-sum((mass - mean(mass))^2)
  ssres<-sum((pred - mass)^2)
  r2<-1-(ssres/sstot)
  
  return(r2)
}



# decay fits
fit_all_curves<-function(df_in, lit){
  
  #df_in <- pmr  #testing stuff
  
  #negative expon fit
  ne_fits <- lapply(split(df_in, factor(df_in$species)),function(x){
    fit_litter(time = x$time_yrs, 
               mass.remaining = x$mass_remaining, model = c("neg.exp"), iters = 1000)
  })
  #create bootstrap distrib and get the 95% CI
  boot.ne<-lapply(ne_fits, function(x){
    bootmat<-bootstrap_parameters(x, nboot=10) 
    #plot(bootmat)
    mean.loss_Ca<-mean(bootmat[,1])
    ci.loss_Ca<-quantile(bootmat[,1], c(.05, .95))
    result<-data.frame(mean.loss_Ca, lower.loss_Ca = ci.loss_Ca[[1]], upper.loss_Ca= ci.loss_Ca[[2]])
    return(result)
  })
  boot.ne.df <- list_to_df(boot.ne)
  # from ne model
  loss_Ca<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$oPpimFit$par))
  t50<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) time_to_prop_mass_remaining(x,threshold.mass=0.5)))
  neg.exp.aic<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$fitAICc))
  ne.r2<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) Calc_R2(x)))
  loss_Ca<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$optimFit$par))
  # put everything in a dataframe
  spdf<-data.frame(loss_Ca=loss_Ca)
  spdf$species<-rownames(spdf)
  
  return(spdf)
}  
neg.exp<-litterfitter:::neg.exp


decayfits5<-x2 %>%
  group_by(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size,number,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
           K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial) %>%
  do(data.frame(fit_all_curves(.)))
#View(decayfits5)
dat_ll1=decayfits5

dat_ll1$Nitrogen_added <- factor(dat_ll1$Nitrogen_added,levels = c("N_0", "N_2", "N_6"), 
                                 labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))

dat_ll1$mesh_size <- factor(dat_ll1$mesh_size,levels = c("0.07 mm", "2 mm", "5 mm"))


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
dat_ml1<-dat_ll1 %>% group_by(Nitrogen_added, mesh_size)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(ml= mean(loss_Ca),
                   sd= sd(loss_Ca),
                   se=sd(loss_Ca,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()))

Calc_decay=ggplot(dat_ml1,aes(mesh_size,ml,color=Nitrogen_added))+
  geom_rect(data=NULL,aes(xmin=1.5,xmax=2.5,ymin=-Inf,ymax=Inf),
            fill="#E8E8E8", colour = NA, alpha = 0.1)+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(0.9),stat="identity",size=3)+
  geom_errorbar(ymax=dat_ml1$ml+dat_ml1$se,ymin=dat_ml1$ml-dat_ml1$se, width=0.3, position = position_dodge(0.9))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,3))+
  #annotate("text", x = 0.75, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 1, y = 0, label = "ns")+
  #annotate("text", x = 1.25, y = 0, label = "c")+
  #annotate("text", x = 1.75, y = 0, label = "ab")+
  annotate("text", x = 2, y = 0, label = "ns")+
  #annotate("text", x = 2.25, y = 0, label = "b")+
  annotate("text", x = 2.75, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 3, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 3.25, y =0, label = "b")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F"),
                     labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))+
  #theme(legend.position = "none")+
  theme(legend.position = c(0.24,0.80))+
  labs( colour="N addition")+
  xlab("Mesh size")+
  ylab(expression(paste( "Calcium decomposition constant "~~ ( yrs^ -1 ))))+guides(color=guide_legend(order=2),shape=guide_legend(order=1))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(11)))+
  theme(
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    legend.text = element_text(size=11))+
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=(11)))+
  theme(axis.title = element_text(family = "palatino", size = (11), colour = "black"))+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(family = "palatino", colour = "black", size = (12)))+ 
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank())

#Calc_decay


ggsave(filename="Figure 3 Caclium decay constant.png", plot=Calc_decay, device="tiff",
       height=3.5, width=4, units="in", dpi=600)
```




#### one-way analysis of variance'mesh_size'

```{r}
dat_ll1$transrate=log(dat_ll1$loss_Ca )
dat_ll1_fine=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="0.07 mm",]
dat_ll1_med=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="2 mm",]
dat_ll1_big=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="5 mm",]
result <- aov(dat_ll1_fine$transrate ~ dat_ll1_fine$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_fine)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(dat_ll1_med$transrate ~ dat_ll1_med$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_med)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(dat_ll1_big$transrate ~ dat_ll1_big$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_big)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
```


#### Establish the lmm model

```{r}
##Inverse normal transformationï¼Inverse Normal Transformationï¼
hist(dat_ll1$loss_Ca)
hist(dat_ll1$transrate)

##Run package
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(pbkrtest)
##Build full model Consider interaction
mod4=lmer(data=dat_ll1, transrate~Nitrogen_added*mesh_size+(1|species))
summary(mod4)
anova(mod4)

###ä¼¼ç¶æ¯æ£éªæ¨¡å
model_no_3way <- update(mod4, . ~ . - mesh_size:Nitrogen_added)
anova(model_no_3way)
anova(mod4,model_no_3way)

###r2æ£éª
library(MuMIn)
r2 <- r.squaredGLMM(mod4)
r2
##Diagnostic model
plot(mod4)
qqnorm(resid(mod4), main = "Q-Qå¾ï¼æ®å·®ï¼")


```

```{r}
cor_test <- cor.test(dat_ll1$k, dat_ll1$loss_Ca)
cor_value <- round(cor_test$estimate, 3)
cor_value
p_value <- round(cor_test$p.value, 4)
cor_test$p.value
```

```{r}
Mass_decay_vs_Calc_decay=ggplot()+ geom_point(data = dat_ll1, 
                        aes(y = loss_Ca , x =k),
                        alpha = 0.5, 
                        size = 3) + 
  geom_smooth(data=dat_ll1,method = "lm",colour= "black" ,se=TRUE, aes(x=k , y= loss_Ca),size=1,linetype=3)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,3))+
  #scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,4))+
  labs(colour ="Mesh size")+ 
  xlab( expression(paste("Decomposition constant k " ~( yrs^ -1 ))))+ylab( expression(paste("Calcium decomposition constant "~( yrs^ -1 ) )))+
  #annotate("text", x = 2, y = 3.5, size=4,label = "italic(R^2)==0.476~~~italic(p)<0.001", parse=TRUE, colour= "black" ) +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.2,0.85))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.15, "cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Mass_decay_vs_Calc_decay

ggsave(filename="Figure 4 Mass decay constant and Calcium decay constant.png", plot=Mass_decay_vs_Calc_decay, device="tiff",
       height=4, width=4, units="in", dpi=600)
```



### Magnesium

```{r}
A1b<- d1ll %>% dplyr::select(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size,number, Time_at_harvest,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
                             K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial,loss_Mg)
A1b$loss_Mg<- as.numeric(A1b$loss_Mg)
library(tidyr)
dt<-A1b %>% drop_na()
#View(dt)
str(dt)
dt$mass_remaining<- (100- dt$loss_Mg)/100
data_aggregated <- dt %>%
  group_by(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size, number,Time_at_harvest,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
           K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial) %>% # Group by the identifier and time columns
  dplyr::summarize(value = mean(mass_remaining, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% # Aggregate (take the mean)
  ungroup()
any(is.na(data_aggregated $value))

# Reshape the data for litterfitter
lit <-data_aggregated 

lit$mass_remaining=lit$value
lit$Time_at_harvest<- as.character(as.character(lit$Time_at_harvest))  
lit$Time_at_harvest<- as.numeric(as.character(lit$Time_at_harvest))
lit$time_yrs<- lit$Time_at_harvest/365

#View(lit)
library("dplyr")

x2 <- lit[which(lit$mass_remaining < 1),]
#View(x2)

library(litterfitter)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(litterfitter)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)


options(na.action = "na.omit")

# turn a list of dataframes into a long dataframe
list_to_df <- function(mylist){
  
  # make a vector of row ids that correspond to the list names
  rowid.indx <- lapply(mylist, function(x) dim(x)[1])
  sourceVec.list <- list()
  for(i in 1:length(rowid.indx)){
    sourceName <- names(rowid.indx)[i]
    numRows <- rowid.indx[[i]]
    sourceVec.list[[i]] <- rep(sourceName, numRows)
  }
  rowVec <- unlist(sourceVec.list)
  
  # combine into df
  df <- data.frame(do.call(rbind, mylist))
  df$source <- rowVec
  
  return(df)
}


# calculate decay trajectory fits for each species per treatment 
Calc_R2<-function(w.fits){
  
  pred<-w.fits[['predicted']]
  mass<-w.fits[['mass']]
  
  sstot<-sum((mass - mean(mass))^2)
  ssres<-sum((pred - mass)^2)
  r2<-1-(ssres/sstot)
  
  return(r2)
}



# decay fits
fit_all_curves<-function(df_in, lit){
  
  #df_in <- pmr  #testing stuff
  
  #negative expon fit
  ne_fits <- lapply(split(df_in, factor(df_in$species)),function(x){
    fit_litter(time = x$time_yrs, 
               mass.remaining = x$mass_remaining, model = c("neg.exp"), iters = 1000)
  })
  #create bootstrap distrib and get the 95% CI
  boot.ne<-lapply(ne_fits, function(x){
    bootmat<-bootstrap_parameters(x, nboot=10) 
    #plot(bootmat)
    mean.loss_Mg<-mean(bootmat[,1])
    ci.loss_Mg<-quantile(bootmat[,1], c(.05, .95))
    result<-data.frame(mean.loss_Mg, lower.loss_Mg = ci.loss_Mg[[1]], upper.loss_Mg= ci.loss_Mg[[2]])
    return(result)
  })
  boot.ne.df <- list_to_df(boot.ne)
  # from ne model
  loss_Mg<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$oPpimFit$par))
  t50<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) time_to_prop_mass_remaining(x,threshold.mass=0.5)))
  neg.exp.aic<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$fitAICc))
  ne.r2<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) Calc_R2(x)))
  loss_Mg<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$optimFit$par))
  # put everything in a dataframe
  spdf<-data.frame(loss_Mg=loss_Mg)
  spdf$species<-rownames(spdf)
  
  return(spdf)
}  
neg.exp<-litterfitter:::neg.exp


decayfits6<-x2 %>%
  group_by(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size,number,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
           K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial) %>%
  do(data.frame(fit_all_curves(.)))
#View(decayfits6)
dat_ll1=decayfits6

dat_ll1$Nitrogen_added <- factor(dat_ll1$Nitrogen_added,levels = c("N_0", "N_2", "N_6"), 
                                 labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))

dat_ll1$mesh_size <- factor(dat_ll1$mesh_size,levels = c("0.07 mm", "2 mm", "5 mm"))


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
dat_ml1<-dat_ll1 %>% group_by(Nitrogen_added, mesh_size)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(ml= mean(loss_Mg),
                   sd= sd(loss_Mg),
                   se=sd(loss_Mg,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()))

Magn_decay=ggplot(dat_ml1,aes(mesh_size,ml,color=Nitrogen_added))+
  geom_rect(data=NULL,aes(xmin=1.5,xmax=2.5,ymin=-Inf,ymax=Inf),
            fill="#E8E8E8", colour = NA, alpha = 0.1)+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(0.9),stat="identity",size=3)+
  geom_errorbar(ymax=dat_ml1$ml+dat_ml1$se,ymin=dat_ml1$ml-dat_ml1$se, width=0.3, position = position_dodge(0.9))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,3))+
  #annotate("text", x = 0.75, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 1, y = 0, label = "ns")+
  #annotate("text", x = 1.25, y = 0, label = "c")+
  annotate("text", x = 1.75, y = 0, label = "ab")+
  annotate("text", x = 2, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 2.25, y = 0, label = "b")+
  annotate("text", x = 2.75, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 3, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 3.25, y =0, label = "b")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F"),
                     labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  labs( colour="N addition")+
  xlab("Mesh size")+
  ylab(expression(paste( "Magnesium decomposition constant "~ ( yrs^ -1 ))))+guides(color=guide_legend(order=2),shape=guide_legend(order=1))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(11)))+
  theme(
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    legend.text = element_text(size=11))+
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=(11)))+
  theme(axis.title = element_text(family = "palatino", size = (11), colour = "black"))+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(family = "palatino", colour = "black", size = (12)))+ 
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank())

#Magn_decay


ggsave(filename="Figure 3 Magnesium decay constant.png", plot=Magn_decay, device="tiff",
       height=3.5, width=4, units="in", dpi=600)
```




#### one-way analysis of variance'mesh_size'

```{r}
dat_ll1$transrate=log(dat_ll1$loss_Mg)
dat_ll1_fine=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="0.07 mm",]
dat_ll1_med=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="2 mm",]
dat_ll1_big=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="5 mm",]
result <- aov(dat_ll1_fine$transrate ~ dat_ll1_fine$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_fine)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(dat_ll1_med$transrate ~ dat_ll1_med$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_med)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(dat_ll1_big$transrate ~ dat_ll1_big$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_big)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
```





#### Establish the lmm model

```{r}
##Inverse normal transformationï¼Inverse Normal Transformationï¼
hist(dat_ll1$loss_Mg)
hist(dat_ll1$transrate)

##Run package
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(pbkrtest)
##Build full model Consider interaction
mod4=lmer(data=dat_ll1, transrate~Nitrogen_added*mesh_size+(1|species))
summary(mod4)
anova(mod4)

###ä¼¼ç¶æ¯æ£éªæ¨¡å
model_no_3way <- update(mod4, . ~ . - mesh_size:Nitrogen_added)
anova(model_no_3way)
anova(mod4,model_no_3way)

###r2æ£éª
library(MuMIn)
r2 <- r.squaredGLMM(mod4)
r2
##Diagnostic model
plot(mod4)
qqnorm(resid(mod4), main = "Q-Qå¾ï¼æ®å·®ï¼")



```

```{r}
cor_test <- cor.test(dat_ll1$k, dat_ll1$loss_Mg)
cor_value <- round(cor_test$estimate, 3)
cor_value
p_value <- round(cor_test$p.value, 4)
cor_test$p.value
```


```{r}
Mass_decay_vs_Magn_decay=ggplot()+ geom_point(data = dat_ll1, 
                        aes(y = loss_Mg , x =k),
                        alpha = 0.5, 
                        size = 3) + 
  geom_smooth(data=dat_ll1,method = "lm",colour= "black" ,se=TRUE, aes(x=k , y= loss_Mg),size=1,linetype=1)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,4))+
  #scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,4))+
  labs(colour ="Mesh size")+ 
  xlab( expression(paste("Decomposition constant k " ~( yrs^ -1 ))))+ylab( expression(paste("Magnesium decomposition constant "~( yrs^ -1 ) )))+
  annotate("text", x = 2, y = 3.5, size=4,label = "italic(R^2)==0.384~~~italic(p)<0.01", parse=TRUE, colour= "black" ) +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.2,0.85))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.15, "cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Mass_decay_vs_Magn_decay

ggsave(filename="Figure 4 Mass decay constant and Magnesium decay constant.png", plot=Mass_decay_vs_Magn_decay, device="tiff",
       height=4, width=4, units="in", dpi=600)
```



### Manganese

```{r}
A1b<- d1ll %>% dplyr::select(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size,number, Time_at_harvest,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
                             K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial,loss_Mn)
A1b$loss_Mn<- as.numeric(A1b$loss_Mn)
library(tidyr)
dt<-A1b %>% drop_na()
#View(dt)
str(dt)
dt$mass_remaining<- (100- dt$loss_Mn)/100
data_aggregated <- dt %>%
  group_by(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size, number,Time_at_harvest,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
           K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial) %>% # Group by the identifier and time columns
  dplyr::summarize(value = mean(mass_remaining, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% # Aggregate (take the mean)
  ungroup()
any(is.na(data_aggregated $value))

# Reshape the data for litterfitter
lit <-data_aggregated 

lit$mass_remaining=lit$value
lit$Time_at_harvest<- as.character(as.character(lit$Time_at_harvest))  
lit$Time_at_harvest<- as.numeric(as.character(lit$Time_at_harvest))
lit$time_yrs<- lit$Time_at_harvest/365

#View(lit)
library("dplyr")

x2 <- lit[which(lit$mass_remaining < 1),]
#View(x2)

library(litterfitter)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(litterfitter)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)


options(na.action = "na.omit")

# turn a list of dataframes into a long dataframe
list_to_df <- function(mylist){
  
  # make a vector of row ids that correspond to the list names
  rowid.indx <- lapply(mylist, function(x) dim(x)[1])
  sourceVec.list <- list()
  for(i in 1:length(rowid.indx)){
    sourceName <- names(rowid.indx)[i]
    numRows <- rowid.indx[[i]]
    sourceVec.list[[i]] <- rep(sourceName, numRows)
  }
  rowVec <- unlist(sourceVec.list)
  
  # combine into df
  df <- data.frame(do.call(rbind, mylist))
  df$source <- rowVec
  
  return(df)
}


# calculate decay trajectory fits for each species per treatment 
Calc_R2<-function(w.fits){
  
  pred<-w.fits[['predicted']]
  mass<-w.fits[['mass']]
  
  sstot<-sum((mass - mean(mass))^2)
  ssres<-sum((pred - mass)^2)
  r2<-1-(ssres/sstot)
  
  return(r2)
}



# decay fits
fit_all_curves<-function(df_in, lit){
  
  #df_in <- pmr  #testing stuff
  
  #negative expon fit
  ne_fits <- lapply(split(df_in, factor(df_in$species)),function(x){
    fit_litter(time = x$time_yrs, 
               mass.remaining = x$mass_remaining, model = c("neg.exp"), iters = 1000)
  })
  #create bootstrap distrib and get the 95% CI
  boot.ne<-lapply(ne_fits, function(x){
    bootmat<-bootstrap_parameters(x, nboot=10) 
    #plot(bootmat)
    mean.loss_Mn<-mean(bootmat[,1])
    ci.loss_Mn<-quantile(bootmat[,1], c(.05, .95))
    result<-data.frame(mean.loss_Mn, lower.loss_Mn = ci.loss_Mn[[1]], upper.loss_Mn= ci.loss_Mn[[2]])
    return(result)
  })
  boot.ne.df <- list_to_df(boot.ne)
  # from ne model
  loss_Mn<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$oPpimFit$par))
  t50<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) time_to_prop_mass_remaining(x,threshold.mass=0.5)))
  neg.exp.aic<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$fitAICc))
  ne.r2<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) Calc_R2(x)))
  loss_Mn<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$optimFit$par))
  # put everything in a dataframe
  spdf<-data.frame(loss_Mn=loss_Mn)
  spdf$species<-rownames(spdf)
  
  return(spdf)
}  
neg.exp<-litterfitter:::neg.exp


decayfits7<-x2 %>%
  group_by(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size,number,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
           K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial) %>%
  do(data.frame(fit_all_curves(.)))
#View(decayfits7)
dat_ll1=decayfits7

dat_ll1$Nitrogen_added <- factor(dat_ll1$Nitrogen_added,levels = c("N_0", "N_2", "N_6"), 
                                 labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))

dat_ll1$mesh_size <- factor(dat_ll1$mesh_size,levels = c("0.07 mm", "2 mm", "5 mm"))


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
dat_ml1<-dat_ll1 %>% group_by(Nitrogen_added, mesh_size)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(ml= mean(loss_Mn),
                   sd= sd(loss_Mn),
                   se=sd(loss_Mn,na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()))

Mang_decay=ggplot(dat_ml1,aes(mesh_size,ml,color=Nitrogen_added))+
  geom_rect(data=NULL,aes(xmin=1.5,xmax=2.5,ymin=-Inf,ymax=Inf),
            fill="#E8E8E8", colour = NA, alpha = 0.1)+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(0.9),stat="identity",size=3)+
  geom_errorbar(ymax=dat_ml1$ml+dat_ml1$se,ymin=dat_ml1$ml-dat_ml1$se, width=0.3, position = position_dodge(0.9))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,3))+
  #annotate("text", x = 0.75, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 1, y = 0, label = "ns")+
  #annotate("text", x = 1.25, y = 0, label = "c")+
  #annotate("text", x = 1.75, y = 0, label = "ab")+
  annotate("text", x = 2, y = 0, label = "ns")+
  #annotate("text", x = 2.25, y = 0, label = "b")+
  #annotate("text", x = 2.75, y = 0, label = "a")+
  annotate("text", x = 3, y = 0, label = "ns")+
  #annotate("text", x = 3.25, y =0, label = "b")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F"),
                     labels = c(expression(N[0]), expression(N[2]), expression(N[6])))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  labs( colour="N addition")+
  xlab("Mesh size")+
  ylab(expression(paste( "Manganese decomposition constant "~~ ( yrs^ -1 ))))+guides(color=guide_legend(order=2),shape=guide_legend(order=1))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(11)))+
  theme(
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    legend.text = element_text(size=11))+
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=(11)))+
  theme(axis.title = element_text(family = "palatino", size = (11), colour = "black"))+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(family = "palatino", colour = "black", size = (12)))+ 
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank())

#Mang_decay


ggsave(filename="Figure 3 Manganese decay constant.png", plot=Mang_decay, device="tiff",
       height=4, width=4, units="in", dpi=600)
```




#### one-way analysis of variance'mesh_size'

```{r}
dat_ll1$transrate=log(dat_ll1$loss_Mn)
dat_ll1_fine=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="0.07 mm",]
dat_ll1_med=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="2 mm",]
dat_ll1_big=dat_ll1[dat_ll1$mesh_size=="5 mm",]
result <- aov(dat_ll1_fine$transrate ~ dat_ll1_fine$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_fine)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(dat_ll1_med$transrate ~ dat_ll1_med$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_med)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
result <- aov(dat_ll1_big$transrate ~ dat_ll1_big$Nitrogen_added, data = dat_ll1_big)
summary(result)
tukey_result <- TukeyHSD(result)
print(tukey_result)
```



#### Establish the lmm model

```{r}
##Inverse normal transformationï¼Inverse Normal Transformationï¼
hist(dat_ll1$loss_Mn)
hist(dat_ll1$transrate)

##Run package
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(pbkrtest)
##Build full model Consider interaction
mod4=lmer(data=dat_ll1, transrate~Nitrogen_added*mesh_size+(1|species))
summary(mod4)
anova(mod4)

###ä¼¼ç¶æ¯æ£éªæ¨¡å
model_no_3way <- update(mod4, . ~ . - mesh_size:Nitrogen_added)
anova(model_no_3way)
anova(mod4,model_no_3way)

###r2æ£éª
library(MuMIn)
r2 <- r.squaredGLMM(mod4)
r2
##Diagnostic model
plot(mod4)
qqnorm(resid(mod4), main = "Q-Qå¾ï¼æ®å·®ï¼")



```

```{r}
cor_test <- cor.test(dat_ll1$k, dat_ll1$loss_Mn)
cor_value <- round(cor_test$estimate, 3)
cor_value
p_value <- round(cor_test$p.value, 4)
cor_test$p.value
```

```{r}
Mass_decay_vs_Mang_decay=ggplot()+ geom_point(data = dat_ll1, 
                        aes(y = loss_Mn , x =k),
                        alpha = 0.5, 
                        size = 3) + 
  geom_smooth(data=dat_ll1,method = "lm",colour= "black" ,se=TRUE, aes(x=k , y= loss_Mn),size=1,linetype=3)+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,3))+
  #scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,4))+
  labs(colour ="Mesh size")+ 
  xlab( expression(paste("Decomposition constant k " ~( yrs^ -1 ))))+ylab( expression(paste("Manganese decomposition constant "~( yrs^ -1 ) )))+
  #annotate("text", x = 2, y = 3.5, size=4,label = "italic(R^2)==0.384~~~italic(p)<0.01", parse=TRUE, colour= "black" ) +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.2,0.85))+
  theme(plot.title =element_text(hjust = 0.5,size=(12)))+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y=element_line(colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.15, "cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA,color="black", size=0.5, linetype="solid"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", size = 12),
        legend.text=element_text(size=10,face="bold.italic"),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key.width=unit(0.2,"cm"),
        legend.key.height=unit(0.2,"cm"))+
  guides(fill="none")+
  scale_color_manual(values =c("#576904","#A98645","#ADFF2F","#A45378","#EFC000"))
#Mass_decay_vs_Mang_decay

ggsave(filename="Figure 4 Mass decay constant and Manganese decay constant.png", plot=Mass_decay_vs_Mang_decay, device="tiff",
       height=4, width=4, units="in", dpi=600)

```




### Condensed tannins

```{r}
A1b<- d1ll %>% dplyr::select(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size,number, Time_at_harvest,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
                             K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial,loss_Tannin)
A1b$loss_Tannin<- as.numeric(A1b$loss_Tannin)
library(tidyr)
dt<-A1b %>% drop_na()
#View(dt)
str(dt)
dt$mass_remaining<- (100- dt$loss_Tannin)/100
data_aggregated <- dt %>%
  group_by(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size, number,Time_at_harvest,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
           K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial) %>% # Group by the identifier and time columns
  dplyr::summarize(value = mean(mass_remaining, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% # Aggregate (take the mean)
  ungroup()
any(is.na(data_aggregated $value))

# Reshape the data for litterfitter
lit <-data_aggregated 

lit$mass_remaining=lit$value
lit$Time_at_harvest<- as.character(as.character(lit$Time_at_harvest))  
lit$Time_at_harvest<- as.numeric(as.character(lit$Time_at_harvest))
lit$time_yrs<- lit$Time_at_harvest/365

#View(lit)
library("dplyr")

x2 <- lit[which(lit$mass_remaining < 1),]
#View(x2)

library(litterfitter)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(litterfitter)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)


options(na.action = "na.omit")

# turn a list of dataframes into a long dataframe
list_to_df <- function(mylist){
  
  # make a vector of row ids that correspond to the list names
  rowid.indx <- lapply(mylist, function(x) dim(x)[1])
  sourceVec.list <- list()
  for(i in 1:length(rowid.indx)){
    sourceName <- names(rowid.indx)[i]
    numRows <- rowid.indx[[i]]
    sourceVec.list[[i]] <- rep(sourceName, numRows)
  }
  rowVec <- unlist(sourceVec.list)
  
  # combine into df
  df <- data.frame(do.call(rbind, mylist))
  df$source <- rowVec
  
  return(df)
}


# calculate decay trajectory fits for each species per treatment 
Calc_R2<-function(w.fits){
  
  pred<-w.fits[['predicted']]
  mass<-w.fits[['mass']]
  
  sstot<-sum((mass - mean(mass))^2)
  ssres<-sum((pred - mass)^2)
  r2<-1-(ssres/sstot)
  
  return(r2)
}



# decay fits
fit_all_curves<-function(df_in, lit){
  
  #df_in <- pmr  #testing stuff
  
  #negative expon fit
  ne_fits <- lapply(split(df_in, factor(df_in$species)),function(x){
    fit_litter(time = x$time_yrs, 
               mass.remaining = x$mass_remaining, model = c("neg.exp"), iters = 1000)
  })
  #create bootstrap distrib and get the 95% CI
  boot.ne<-lapply(ne_fits, function(x){
    bootmat<-bootstrap_parameters(x, nboot=10) 
    #plot(bootmat)
    mean.loss_Tannin<-mean(bootmat[,1])
    ci.loss_Tannin<-quantile(bootmat[,1], c(.05, .95))
    result<-data.frame(mean.loss_Tannin, lower.loss_Tannin = ci.loss_Tannin[[1]], upper.loss_Tannin= ci.loss_Tannin[[2]])
    return(result)
  })
  boot.ne.df <- list_to_df(boot.ne)
  # from ne model
  loss_Tannin<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$oPpimFit$par))
  t50<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) time_to_prop_mass_remaining(x,threshold.mass=0.5)))
  neg.exp.aic<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$fitAICc))
  ne.r2<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) Calc_R2(x)))
  loss_Tannin<-unlist(lapply(ne_fits, function(x) x$optimFit$par))
  # put everything in a dataframe
  spdf<-data.frame(loss_Tannin=loss_Tannin)
  spdf$species<-rownames(spdf)
  
  return(spdf)
}  
neg.exp<-litterfitter:::neg.exp


decayfits8<-x2 %>%
  group_by(species,tree_quality,Nitrogen_added,mesh_size,number,k,C_initial,N_initial,P_initial,
           K_initial,Ca_initial,Mg_initial,Mn_initial,Tannin_initial) %>%
  do(data.frame(fit_all_curves(.)))
#View(decayfits8)
dat_ll1=decayfits8

dat_ll1$Nitrogen_added <- factor(dat_ll1$Nitrogen_added,levels = c("N_0", "N_2", "N_6"),
```
